REALISM / SURVIVAL CHECKLIST (minimum)
--------------------------------------
• Walk-forward: split history into sequential windows; tune on train, validate on next window only.
• Friction: add fees + slippage + spread; stress with 2× and 4× friction multipliers.
• Regime robustness: require stable performance across multiple regime buckets (trend/range/volatile).
• Risk limits: max exposure per symbol, max drawdown stop, and kill-switch for degraded fitness.
• No-leakage: indicators must use only past candles; avoid using final equity to pick parameters.

␀namespace TQGA.Application.Accounting;

public sealed class EquityCurve
{
    private readonly List<(DateTime Time, decimal Value)> _points = new();

    public decimal Current { get; private set; }

    public IReadOnlyList<(DateTime Time, decimal Value)> Points => _points;

    public void Seed(decimal startingCapital)
    {
        Current = startingCapital;
        _points.Clear();
        _points.Add((DateTime.MinValue, startingCapital));
    }

    public void Update(DateTime time, decimal equity)
    {
        Current = equity;
        _points.Add((time, equity));
    }

    public void ApplyPnL(DateTime time, decimal pnl)
    {
        Current += pnl;
        _points.Add((time, Current));
    }
}

␀using TQGA.Domain.Trading;

namespace TQGA.Application.Accounting;

public sealed class TradeLedger
{
    private readonly List<Trade> _trades = new();

    public IReadOnlyList<Trade> Trades => _trades.AsReadOnly();

    public void Record(Trade trade)
    {
        _trades.Add(trade);
    }

    public decimal TotalPnL =>
        _trades.Sum(t => t.RealizedPnL);

    public int TotalTrades => _trades.Count;

    public int WinCount =>
        _trades.Count(t => t.RealizedPnL > 0);

    public int LossCount =>
        _trades.Count(t => t.RealizedPnL < 0);

    // ✅ NEW — SYMBOL PnL ATTRIBUTION
    public Dictionary<string, decimal> PnLBySymbol =>
        _trades
            .Where(t => t.IsClosed)
            .GroupBy(t => t.Symbol)
            .ToDictionary(
                g => g.Key,
                g => g.Sum(t => t.RealizedPnL));
}

␀using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using TQGA.Application.Interfaces;
using TQGA.Application.Trading;
using TQGA.Domain.Market;

namespace TQGA.Application.Backtesting;

public sealed class BacktestRunner
{
    private readonly ICandleDataFeed _feed;
    private readonly ITradingEngine _engine;

    public BacktestRunner(ICandleDataFeed feed, ITradingEngine engine)
    {
        _feed = feed;
        _engine = engine;
    }

    public async Task RunAsync(string symbol, string timeframe, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        foreach (Candle candle in _feed.GetCandles(symbol, timeframe))
        {
            await _engine.OnTickAsync(
                symbol,
                candle.Close,
                candle.Time,
                ct);
        }
    }
}

␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀B␀a␀c␀k␀t␀e␀s␀t␀i␀n␀g␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀B␀a␀c␀k␀t␀e␀s␀t␀R␀e␀s␀u␀l␀t␀.␀c␀s␀␀

␀using TQGA.Application.Portfolio;
using TQGA.Application.Trading;

namespace TQGA.Application.Backtesting;

public sealed class PortfolioBacktestResult
{
    public Dictionary<int, decimal> StrategyPnL { get; init; } = new();

    public Dictionary<string, decimal> SymbolPnL { get; init; } =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    public Dictionary<int, decimal> CapitalWeights { get; init; } = new();

    public Dictionary<DateTime, decimal> PortfolioEquityTimeline { get; init; } = new();

    public Dictionary<string, decimal> SymbolTimeframePnL { get; init; } =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    public Dictionary<string, decimal> StrategySymbolTimeframePnL { get; init; } =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    public Dictionary<int, TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot> StrategyDiagnostics { get; init; } = new();

    public Dictionary<string, string> MarketSelectionRejections { get; init; } =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    public List<string> SelectedMarkets { get; init; } = new();

    public List<WalkForwardFoldSnapshot> WalkForwardFolds { get; init; } = new();

    public Dictionary<string, decimal> CioSymbolTimeframeWeights { get; init; } =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    // NEW — REPORT_06 realism bridge
    public Dictionary<string, decimal> MarketAllocationWeights { get; init; } =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    public decimal CashAllocationWeight { get; init; }

    public bool HasMarketAllocationWeights =>
        MarketAllocationWeights is { Count: > 0 };
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀B␀a␀c␀k␀t␀e␀s␀t␀i␀n␀g␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀B␀a␀c␀k␀t␀e␀s␀t␀R␀u␀n␀n␀e␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀3␀8␀.␀3␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀8␀4␀9␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using TQGA.Application.Accounting;
using TQGA.Application.Interfaces;
using TQGA.Application.Portfolio;
using TQGA.Application.Risk;
using TQGA.Application.Strategy;
using TQGA.Application.Trading;
using TQGA.Domain.Market;

namespace TQGA.Application.Backtesting;

public sealed class PortfolioBacktestRunner
{
    private readonly IServiceProvider _root;
    private readonly StrategyFactory _factory;
    private readonly ICandleDataFeed _feed;

    private const decimal PortfolioCapital = 100_000m;

    // WAVE B — institutional scarcity controls
    private const int WaveBTopNMarkets = 8;
    private const int WaveBMinMarkets = 5;
    private const int WaveBPerSymbolCap = 1;
    private const decimal WaveBMinScoreThreshold = 0.55m;
    private const decimal WaveBMaxWeightPerMarket = 0.20m;

    public PortfolioBacktestRunner(
        IServiceProvider root,
        StrategyFactory factory,
        ICandleDataFeed feed)
    {
        _root = root;
        _factory = factory;
        _feed = feed;
    }

    public Task<PortfolioBacktestResult> RunAsync(
        IEnumerable<Type> strategyTypes,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        return RunAsync(
            strategyTypes,
            BinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols,
            BinanceUniverse.Timeframes,
            FrictionProfile.Default,
            ct);
    }

    public Task<PortfolioBacktestResult> RunAsync(
        IEnumerable<Type> strategyTypes,
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedTimeframes,
        FrictionProfile friction,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        return RunAsync(
            strategyTypes,
            BinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols,
            selectedTimeframes,
            friction,
            ct);
    }

    public async Task<PortfolioBacktestResult> RunAsync(
        IEnumerable<Type> strategyTypes,
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedSymbols,
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedTimeframes,
        FrictionProfile friction,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(strategyTypes);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(selectedSymbols);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(selectedTimeframes);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(friction);

        var types = strategyTypes.ToList();
        if (types.Count == 0)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("No strategies registered.");

        var activeSymbols = selectedSymbols.Count == 0
            ? BinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols.ToList()
            : selectedSymbols
                .Where(x => BinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols.Contains(x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                .ToList();

        if (activeSymbols.Count == 0)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("No valid symbols selected.");

        var activeTimeframes = selectedTimeframes.Count == 0
            ? BinanceUniverse.Timeframes.ToList()
            : selectedTimeframes
                .Where(x => BinanceUniverse.Timeframes.Contains(x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                .ToList();

        if (activeTimeframes.Count == 0)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("No valid timeframes selected.");

        var selection = new PreTradeMarketSelectionService()
            .SelectMarkets(
                _feed,
                activeSymbols,
                activeTimeframes,
                topN: 12);

        var rankedSelectedMarkets = selection.SelectedMarkets.ToList();

        if (rankedSelectedMarkets.Count == 0)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("No markets passed pre-trade selection.");

        var combinedRejections = new Dictionary<string, string>(
            selection.RejectedMarkets,
            StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        var waveBSelection = ApplyWaveBSelection(rankedSelectedMarkets, combinedRejections);
        var selectedMarkets = waveBSelection.SelectedMarkets;

        if (selectedMarkets.Count == 0)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("No markets passed Wave B signal ranking and Top-N execution.");

        var marketAllocationWeights = waveBSelection.AllocationWeights;
        var unallocatedCashWeight = waveBSelection.CashWeight;

        var leadershipRank = new Dictionary<MarketKey, int>();
        for (int i = 0; i < selectedMarkets.Count; i++)
            leadershipRank[selectedMarkets[i]] = i + 1;

        var riskBudget = new PortfolioRiskBudgetEngine();

        var rawNetPnlByMarket = selectedMarkets.ToDictionary(m => m, _ => 0m);
        var tradeCountByMarket = selectedMarkets.ToDictionary(m => m, _ => 0);
        var positiveStrategyHitsByMarket = selectedMarkets.ToDictionary(m => m, _ => 0);
        var strategyParticipationByMarket = selectedMarkets.ToDictionary(m => m, _ => 0);

        var nodes = new List<StrategyBacktestNode>();
        var capitalWeights = new Dictionary<int, decimal>();

        // ECONOMIC TRUTH LAYER
        var symbolTfPnL = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var strategySymbolTfPnL = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var strategyDiagnostics = new Dictionary<int, TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot>();

        // NEW: institutional trust-weighted capital map
        var trustWeightsByType = BuildStrategyTrustWeights(types);

        int id = 1;

        foreach (var type in types)
        {
            using var scope = _root.CreateScope();

            var strategy = _factory.Create(type);

            var engine = ActivatorUtilities.CreateInstance<TradingEngine>(
                scope.ServiceProvider,
                strategy);

            var ledger = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<TradeLedger>();
            var equity = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<EquityCurve>();
            var capital = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<ICapitalAllocator>();
            var diag = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<TradeDecisionDiagnostics>();

            decimal strategyWeight = trustWeightsByType.TryGetValue(type, out var resolvedWeight)
                ? resolvedWeight
                : 0m;

            capital.Seed(PortfolioCapital, strategyWeight);

            decimal allocatedCapital = PortfolioCapital * strategyWeight;
            equity.Seed(allocatedCapital);

            capitalWeights[id] = strategyWeight;

            if (strategyWeight <= 0m)
            {
                strategyDiagnostics[id] = new TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot
                {
                    TicksProcessed = 0,
                    SignalLong = 0,
                    SignalShort = 0,
                    SignalExit = 0,
                    EntryAttempts = 0,
                    ExecutedEntries = 0,
                    ExecutedExits = 0
                };

                nodes.Add(new StrategyBacktestNode(
                    id,
                    strategy.Name,
                    ledger,
                    equity));

                id++;
                continue;
            }

            var openRiskBySymbol = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            var openRiskByCluster = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            decimal totalOpenRiskPct = 0m;
            decimal peakEquity = allocatedCapital;

            foreach (var m in selectedMarkets)
            {
                var marketWeight = marketAllocationWeights.TryGetValue(m, out var resolvedMarketWeight)
                    ? resolvedMarketWeight
                    : 0m;

                if (marketWeight <= 0m)
                    continue;

                var candles = _feed.GetCandles(m.Symbol, m.Timeframe)
                    .OrderBy(c => c.Time)
                    .ToList();

                if (candles.Count < 120)
                    continue;

                var currentEquity = System.Math.Max(1m, allocatedCapital + ledger.TotalPnL);
                peakEquity = System.Math.Max(peakEquity, currentEquity);

                var drawdownPct = peakEquity <= 0m
                    ? 0m
                    : ((peakEquity - currentEquity) / peakEquity) * 100m;

                var budget = riskBudget.Evaluate(
                    m.Symbol,
                    m.Timeframe,
                    candles,
                    currentEquity,
                    drawdownPct,
                    openRiskBySymbol,
                    openRiskByCluster,
                    totalOpenRiskPct);

                if (!budget.IsAllowed)
                    continue;

                openRiskBySymbol[m.Symbol] =
                    (openRiskBySymbol.TryGetValue(m.Symbol, out var sRisk) ? sRisk : 0m)
                    + budget.AllowedRiskPct;

                var cluster = budget.Cluster;
                openRiskByCluster[cluster] =
                    (openRiskByCluster.TryGetValue(cluster, out var cRisk) ? cRisk : 0m)
                    + budget.AllowedRiskPct;

                totalOpenRiskPct += budget.AllowedRiskPct;

                var beforePnl = GetSymbolPnL(ledger, m.Symbol);
                var beforeTradeCount = GetTradeCount(ledger);

                foreach (var candle in candles)
                {
                    await engine.OnTickAsync(
                        m.Symbol,
                        candle.Close,
                        candle.Time,
                        ct);
                }

                var afterPnl = GetSymbolPnL(ledger, m.Symbol);
                var afterTradeCount = GetTradeCount(ledger);

                var grossDelta = afterPnl - beforePnl;
                var marketTradeCount = System.Math.Max(0, afterTradeCount - beforeTradeCount);

                var budgetScale = budget.AllowedRiskPct <= 0m
                    ? 0m
                    : budget.AllowedRiskPct / 0.50m;

                var effectiveScale = budgetScale * marketWeight;
                var scaledGrossDelta = grossDelta * effectiveScale;

                var frictionCost = EstimateFrictionCost(
                    budget.PositionValue * marketWeight,
                    marketTradeCount,
                    friction,
                    candles);

                var netDelta = scaledGrossDelta - frictionCost;

                var keyTf = $"{m.Symbol}::{m.Timeframe}";
                if (symbolTfPnL.ContainsKey(keyTf))
                    symbolTfPnL[keyTf] += netDelta;
                else
                    symbolTfPnL[keyTf] = netDelta;

                var keyStrTf = $"S{id:00}::{m.Symbol}::{m.Timeframe}";
                if (strategySymbolTfPnL.ContainsKey(keyStrTf))
                    strategySymbolTfPnL[keyStrTf] += netDelta;
                else
                    strategySymbolTfPnL[keyStrTf] = netDelta;

                rawNetPnlByMarket[m] += netDelta;
                tradeCountByMarket[m] += marketTradeCount;
                strategyParticipationByMarket[m] += 1;

                if (netDelta > 0m)
                    positiveStrategyHitsByMarket[m] += 1;

                openRiskBySymbol[m.Symbol] = System.Math.Max(0m, openRiskBySymbol[m.Symbol] - budget.AllowedRiskPct);
                openRiskByCluster[cluster] = System.Math.Max(0m, openRiskByCluster[cluster] - budget.AllowedRiskPct);
                totalOpenRiskPct = System.Math.Max(0m, totalOpenRiskPct - budget.AllowedRiskPct);
            }

            strategyDiagnostics[id] = new TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot
            {
                TicksProcessed = diag.TicksProcessed,
                SignalLong = diag.SignalLong,
                SignalShort = diag.SignalShort,
                SignalExit = diag.SignalExit,
                EntryAttempts = diag.EntryAttempts,
                ExecutedEntries = diag.ExecutedEntries,
                ExecutedExits = diag.ExecutedExits
            };

            nodes.Add(new StrategyBacktestNode(
                id,
                strategy.Name,
                ledger,
                equity));

            id++;
        }

        var compositeMarketScore = BuildCompositeMarketScores(
            selectedMarkets,
            rawNetPnlByMarket,
            tradeCountByMarket,
            positiveStrategyHitsByMarket,
            strategyParticipationByMarket,
            leadershipRank);

        var cio = new CioDynamicReallocationEngine(
            topK: 6,
            minWeight: 0.00m,
            maxWeight: 0.35m,
            maxWeightPerSymbol: 0.45m);

        var cioWeights = cio.ComputeWeights(compositeMarketScore);

        var adjustedSymbolPnL = AggregateAdjustedSymbolPnL(symbolTfPnL);

        var baseResult = BuildResult(
            nodes,
            capitalWeights,
            adjustedSymbolPnL);

        var walkForwardFolds = await RunTrueWalkForwardAsync(
            types,
            selectedMarkets,
            friction,
            trustWeightsByType,
            ct);

        var result = new PortfolioBacktestResult
        {
            StrategyPnL = baseResult.StrategyPnL,
            SymbolPnL = baseResult.SymbolPnL,
            CapitalWeights = baseResult.CapitalWeights,
            PortfolioEquityTimeline = baseResult.PortfolioEquityTimeline,
            SymbolTimeframePnL = symbolTfPnL,
            StrategySymbolTimeframePnL = strategySymbolTfPnL,
            StrategyDiagnostics = strategyDiagnostics,
            MarketSelectionRejections = combinedRejections,
            SelectedMarkets = selectedMarkets.Select(x => $"{x.Symbol}::{x.Timeframe}").ToList(),
            WalkForwardFolds = walkForwardFolds,
            CioSymbolTimeframeWeights = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(
                cioWeights.ToDictionary(
                    w => $"CIO::{w.Key.Symbol}::{w.Key.Timeframe}",
                    w => w.Value),
                StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase),

            MarketAllocationWeights = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(
                marketAllocationWeights.ToDictionary(
                    x => $"{x.Key.Symbol}::{x.Key.Timeframe}",
                    x => x.Value),
                StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase),

            CashAllocationWeight = unallocatedCashWeight
        };

        return result;
    }

    private Dictionary<Type, decimal> BuildStrategyTrustWeights(
        IReadOnlyList<Type> strategyTypes)
    {
        var raw = new Dictionary<Type, decimal>();

        foreach (var type in strategyTypes)
        {
            var strategy = _factory.Create(type);
            decimal trust = GetStrategyTrustPrior(type, strategy.Name);
            raw[type] = System.Math.Max(0m, trust);
        }

        decimal totalPositive = raw.Values.Where(x => x > 0m).Sum();

        if (totalPositive <= 0m)
        {
            decimal equal = strategyTypes.Count == 0
                ? 0m
                : 1m / strategyTypes.Count;

            return strategyTypes.ToDictionary(x => x, _ => equal);
        }

        return raw.ToDictionary(
            kv => kv.Key,
            kv => kv.Value <= 0m ? 0m : kv.Value / totalPositive);
    }

    private static decimal GetStrategyTrustPrior(Type type, string strategyName)
    {
        string typeName = type.Name;
        string name = strategyName ?? string.Empty;

        if (ContainsAny(typeName, name, "EmaRsiQuantStrategy"))
            return 1.00m;

        if (ContainsAny(typeName, name, "EmaTrendQuantStrategy"))
            return 0.75m;

        if (ContainsAny(typeName, name, "EmaTrendPullback"))
            return 0.20m;

        if (ContainsAny(typeName, name, "RsiSwing"))
            return 0.15m;

        if (ContainsAny(typeName, name, "AltcoinLeadershipPullback"))
            return 0.00m;

        if (ContainsAny(typeName, name, "Diagnostic"))
            return 0.00m;

        return 0.10m;
    }

    private static bool ContainsAny(string typeName, string strategyName, string token)
    {
        return typeName.Contains(token, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            || strategyName.Contains(token, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static WaveBSelectionSnapshot ApplyWaveBSelection(
        IReadOnlyList<dynamic> rankedSelectedMarkets,
        Dictionary<string, string> combinedRejections)
    {
        var candidates = new List<WaveBCandidate>();

        if (rankedSelectedMarkets.Count == 0)
            return new WaveBSelectionSnapshot();

        decimal maxBaseScore = rankedSelectedMarkets
            .Select(x => SafeDecimal(x.Score))
            .DefaultIfEmpty(0m)
            .Max();

        if (maxBaseScore <= 0m)
            maxBaseScore = 1m;

        for (int i = 0; i < rankedSelectedMarkets.Count; i++)
        {
            var item = rankedSelectedMarkets[i];
            MarketKey market = item.Market;
            decimal baseScore = SafeDecimal(item.Score);

            decimal normalizedPreTradeScore = baseScore <= 0m
                ? 0m
                : baseScore / maxBaseScore;

            decimal timeframePreferenceScore = market.Timeframe.Equals("4h", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                ? 1.00m
                : market.Timeframe.Equals("1d", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                    ? 0.80m
                    : 0.55m;

            decimal liquidityScore = GetLiquidityScore(market.Symbol);

            decimal leadershipScore = rankedSelectedMarkets.Count == 1
                ? 1.00m
                : 1.00m - (((decimal)i / (rankedSelectedMarkets.Count - 1)) * 0.25m);

            decimal finalScore =
                (normalizedPreTradeScore * 0.60m) +
                (timeframePreferenceScore * 0.25m) +
                (liquidityScore * 0.15m);

            finalScore *= leadershipScore;

            candidates.Add(new WaveBCandidate
            {
                Market = market,
                BasePreTradeScore = baseScore,
                NormalizedPreTradeScore = normalizedPreTradeScore,
                TimeframePreferenceScore = timeframePreferenceScore,
                LiquidityScore = liquidityScore,
                LeadershipScore = leadershipScore,
                FinalScore = finalScore
            });
        }

        var ranked = candidates
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.FinalScore)
            .ThenByDescending(x => x.NormalizedPreTradeScore)
            .ThenBy(x => x.Market.Symbol, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(x => x.Market.Timeframe, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToList();

        var selectedCandidates = new List<WaveBCandidate>();
        var selectedPerSymbol = new Dictionary<string, int>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        foreach (var candidate in ranked)
        {
            string marketKey = $"{candidate.Market.Symbol}::{candidate.Market.Timeframe}";

            if (candidate.FinalScore < WaveBMinScoreThreshold)
            {
                combinedRejections[marketKey] =
                    $"WaveBRejected:BelowThreshold(score={candidate.FinalScore:F4},min={WaveBMinScoreThreshold:F2})";
                continue;
            }

            int currentSymbolCount = selectedPerSymbol.TryGetValue(candidate.Market.Symbol, out int existingCount)
                ? existingCount
                : 0;

            if (currentSymbolCount >= WaveBPerSymbolCap)
            {
                combinedRejections[marketKey] =
                    $"WaveBRejected:PerSymbolCap(symbol={candidate.Market.Symbol},cap={WaveBPerSymbolCap})";
                continue;
            }

            if (selectedCandidates.Count >= WaveBTopNMarkets)
            {
                combinedRejections[marketKey] =
                    $"WaveBRejected:TopNOverflow(topN={WaveBTopNMarkets})";
                continue;
            }

            selectedCandidates.Add(candidate);
            selectedPerSymbol[candidate.Market.Symbol] = currentSymbolCount + 1;
        }

        if (selectedCandidates.Count < WaveBMinMarkets)
        {
            foreach (var candidate in ranked)
            {
                if (selectedCandidates.Count >= WaveBMinMarkets)
                    break;

                if (selectedCandidates.Any(x =>
                        x.Market.Symbol.Equals(candidate.Market.Symbol, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                        x.Market.Timeframe.Equals(candidate.Market.Timeframe, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
                    continue;

                int currentSymbolCount = selectedPerSymbol.TryGetValue(candidate.Market.Symbol, out int existingCount)
                    ? existingCount
                    : 0;

                if (currentSymbolCount >= WaveBPerSymbolCap)
                    continue;

                string marketKey = $"{candidate.Market.Symbol}::{candidate.Market.Timeframe}";
                selectedCandidates.Add(candidate);
                selectedPerSymbol[candidate.Market.Symbol] = currentSymbolCount + 1;

                if (combinedRejections.ContainsKey(marketKey) &&
                    combinedRejections[marketKey].StartsWith("WaveBRejected:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    combinedRejections.Remove(marketKey);
                }
            }
        }

        var allocationWeights = BuildAllocationWeights(selectedCandidates);
        var cashWeight = System.Math.Max(0m, 1m - allocationWeights.Values.Sum());

        return new WaveBSelectionSnapshot
        {
            SelectedMarkets = selectedCandidates.Select(x => x.Market).ToList(),
            AllocationWeights = allocationWeights,
            CashWeight = cashWeight
        };
    }

    private static Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> BuildAllocationWeights(
        IReadOnlyList<WaveBCandidate> selectedCandidates)
    {
        var output = new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        if (selectedCandidates.Count == 0)
            return output;

        decimal minScore = selectedCandidates.Min(x => x.FinalScore);
        var shifted = selectedCandidates
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Market,
                Weight = System.Math.Max(0.000001m, x.FinalScore - minScore + 0.000001m)
            })
            .ToList();

        decimal shiftedTotal = shifted.Sum(x => x.Weight);
        if (shiftedTotal <= 0m)
            return output;

        var provisional = shifted.ToDictionary(
            x => x.Market,
            x => x.Weight / shiftedTotal);

        var capped = new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();
        decimal overflow = 0m;

        foreach (var kv in provisional)
        {
            if (kv.Value > WaveBMaxWeightPerMarket)
            {
                capped[kv.Key] = WaveBMaxWeightPerMarket;
                overflow += kv.Value - WaveBMaxWeightPerMarket;
            }
            else
            {
                capped[kv.Key] = kv.Value;
            }
        }

        int redistributionGuard = 0;
        while (overflow > 0.0000001m && redistributionGuard < 20)
        {
            redistributionGuard++;

            var underCap = capped
                .Where(x => x.Value < WaveBMaxWeightPerMarket)
                .ToList();

            if (underCap.Count == 0)
                break;

            decimal underCapTotal = underCap.Sum(x => x.Value);
            if (underCapTotal <= 0m)
                break;

            decimal distributedThisRound = 0m;

            foreach (var kv in underCap)
            {
                decimal room = WaveBMaxWeightPerMarket - kv.Value;
                if (room <= 0m)
                    continue;

                decimal add = overflow * (kv.Value / underCapTotal);
                if (add > room)
                    add = room;

                capped[kv.Key] += add;
                distributedThisRound += add;
            }

            if (distributedThisRound <= 0m)
                break;

            overflow -= distributedThisRound;
        }

        foreach (var kv in capped.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value))
            output[kv.Key] = kv.Value;

        return output;
    }

    private static decimal SafeDecimal(dynamic value)
    {
        try
        {
            if (value == null)
                return 0m;

            return Convert.ToDecimal(value);
        }
        catch
        {
            return 0m;
        }
    }

    private static decimal GetLiquidityScore(string symbol)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(symbol))
            return 0.40m;

        if (symbol.Equals("BTCUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return 1.00m;

        if (symbol.Equals("ETHUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return 0.98m;

        if (symbol.Equals("BNBUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            symbol.Equals("SOLUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            symbol.Equals("XRPUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return 0.92m;

        if (symbol.Equals("ADAUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            symbol.Equals("DOGEUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            symbol.Equals("TRXUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            symbol.Equals("AVAXUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            symbol.Equals("DOTUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            symbol.Equals("LINKUSDT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return 0.85m;

        return 0.72m;
    }

    private Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> BuildCompositeMarketScores(
        IReadOnlyList<MarketKey> selectedMarkets,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<MarketKey, decimal> rawNetPnlByMarket,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<MarketKey, int> tradeCountByMarket,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<MarketKey, int> positiveStrategyHitsByMarket,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<MarketKey, int> strategyParticipationByMarket,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<MarketKey, int> leadershipRank)
    {
        var output = new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        decimal maxPositivePnl = System.Math.Max(
            1m,
            rawNetPnlByMarket.Values.Where(x => x > 0m).DefaultIfEmpty(0m).Max());

        int maxTrades = System.Math.Max(
            1,
            tradeCountByMarket.Values.DefaultIfEmpty(0).Max());

        int maxParticipation = System.Math.Max(
            1,
            strategyParticipationByMarket.Values.DefaultIfEmpty(0).Max());

        foreach (var market in selectedMarkets)
        {
            decimal netPnl = rawNetPnlByMarket.TryGetValue(market, out var pnl) ? pnl : 0m;
            int trades = tradeCountByMarket.TryGetValue(market, out var tc) ? tc : 0;
            int posHits = positiveStrategyHitsByMarket.TryGetValue(market, out var ph) ? ph : 0;
            int participation = strategyParticipationByMarket.TryGetValue(market, out var sp) ? sp : 0;
            int rank = leadershipRank.TryGetValue(market, out var lr) ? lr : selectedMarkets.Count;

            if (netPnl <= 0m)
            {
                output[market] = 0m;
                continue;
            }

            decimal pnlStrength = netPnl / maxPositivePnl;
            decimal tradeStrength = (decimal)trades / maxTrades;
            decimal participationStrength = (decimal)participation / maxParticipation;
            decimal consistencyStrength = participation <= 0
                ? 0m
                : (decimal)posHits / participation;

            decimal timeframeBonus = market.Timeframe.Equals("4h", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                ? 1.20m
                : market.Timeframe.Equals("1d", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                    ? 0.85m
                    : 0.55m;

            decimal leadershipBonus = selectedMarkets.Count <= 1
                ? 1.00m
                : 1.20m - ((decimal)(rank - 1) / (selectedMarkets.Count - 1)) * 0.35m;

            decimal tradeSufficiencyPenalty = trades switch
            {
                <= 0 => 0.10m,
                < 3 => 0.40m,
                < 8 => 0.70m,
                _ => 1.00m
            };

            decimal score =
                (netPnl * 1.00m) *
                (0.60m + pnlStrength * 0.40m) *
                (0.55m + tradeStrength * 0.45m) *
                (0.50m + consistencyStrength * 0.50m) *
                (0.70m + participationStrength * 0.30m) *
                leadershipBonus *
                timeframeBonus *
                tradeSufficiencyPenalty;

            output[market] = System.Math.Max(0m, score);
        }

        return output;
    }

    private async Task<List<WalkForwardFoldSnapshot>> RunTrueWalkForwardAsync(
        IReadOnlyList<Type> strategyTypes,
        IReadOnlyList<MarketKey> selectedMarkets,
        FrictionProfile friction,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<Type, decimal> trustWeightsByType,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        var allTimes = selectedMarkets
            .SelectMany(m => _feed.GetCandles(m.Symbol, m.Timeframe).Select(c => c.Time))
            .Distinct()
            .OrderBy(x => x)
            .ToList();

        var folds = new List<WalkForwardFoldSnapshot>();

        if (allTimes.Count < 200)
            return folds;

        int minTrain = System.Math.Max(100, allTimes.Count / 2);
        int testSize = System.Math.Max(50, allTimes.Count / 10);

        int foldNo = 1;
        for (int trainEndIndex = minTrain - 1;
             trainEndIndex + testSize < allTimes.Count && foldNo <= 5;
             trainEndIndex += testSize, foldNo++)
        {
            var trainStartUtc = allTimes[0];
            var trainEndUtc = allTimes[trainEndIndex];
            var testStartUtc = allTimes[trainEndIndex + 1];
            var testEndUtc = allTimes[System.Math.Min(allTimes.Count - 1, trainEndIndex + testSize)];

            decimal startEquity = 0m;
            decimal endEquity = 0m;

            foreach (var type in strategyTypes)
            {
                decimal strategyWeight = trustWeightsByType.TryGetValue(type, out var resolvedWeight)
                    ? resolvedWeight
                    : 0m;

                if (strategyWeight <= 0m)
                    continue;

                using var scope = _root.CreateScope();

                var strategy = _factory.Create(type);
                var engine = ActivatorUtilities.CreateInstance<TradingEngine>(
                    scope.ServiceProvider,
                    strategy);

                var ledger = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<TradeLedger>();
                var equity = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<EquityCurve>();
                var capital = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<ICapitalAllocator>();

                capital.Seed(PortfolioCapital, strategyWeight);

                decimal allocatedCapital = PortfolioCapital * strategyWeight;
                equity.Seed(allocatedCapital);

                foreach (var market in selectedMarkets)
                {
                    var trainCandles = _feed.GetCandles(market.Symbol, market.Timeframe)
                        .Where(c => c.Time >= trainStartUtc && c.Time <= trainEndUtc)
                        .OrderBy(c => c.Time)
                        .ToList();

                    foreach (var candle in trainCandles)
                    {
                        await engine.OnTickAsync(
                            market.Symbol,
                            candle.Close,
                            candle.Time,
                            ct);
                    }
                }

                decimal pnlAfterTrain = ledger.TotalPnL;
                int tradesAfterTrain = ledger.TotalTrades;

                foreach (var market in selectedMarkets)
                {
                    var testCandles = _feed.GetCandles(market.Symbol, market.Timeframe)
                        .Where(c => c.Time >= testStartUtc && c.Time <= testEndUtc)
                        .OrderBy(c => c.Time)
                        .ToList();

                    foreach (var candle in testCandles)
                    {
                        await engine.OnTickAsync(
                            market.Symbol,
                            candle.Close,
                            candle.Time,
                            ct);
                    }
                }

                decimal pnlAfterTest = ledger.TotalPnL;
                int tradesAfterTest = ledger.TotalTrades;

                decimal testGrossPnl = pnlAfterTest - pnlAfterTrain;
                int testTrades = System.Math.Max(0, tradesAfterTest - tradesAfterTrain);

                var testCandlesForCost = selectedMarkets
                    .SelectMany(m => _feed.GetCandles(m.Symbol, m.Timeframe)
                        .Where(c => c.Time >= testStartUtc && c.Time <= testEndUtc))
                    .OrderBy(c => c.Time)
                    .ToList();

                decimal testFriction = EstimateFrictionCost(
                    allocatedCapital,
                    testTrades,
                    friction,
                    testCandlesForCost);

                decimal eqStart = allocatedCapital;
                decimal eqEnd = allocatedCapital + testGrossPnl - testFriction;

                startEquity += eqStart;
                endEquity += eqEnd;
            }

            var returnPct = startEquity <= 0m
                ? 0m
                : ((endEquity - startEquity) / startEquity) * 100m;

            folds.Add(new WalkForwardFoldSnapshot
            {
                FoldNo = foldNo,
                TrainStartUtc = trainStartUtc,
                TrainEndUtc = trainEndUtc,
                TestStartUtc = testStartUtc,
                TestEndUtc = testEndUtc,
                StartEquity = startEquity,
                EndEquity = endEquity,
                ReturnPct = returnPct,
                TestPoints = System.Math.Max(0, testSize)
            });
        }

        return folds;
    }

    private static PortfolioBacktestResult BuildResult(
        IReadOnlyList<StrategyBacktestNode> nodes,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<int, decimal> capitalWeights,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal> adjustedSymbolPnL)
    {
        var strategyPnL = new Dictionary<int, decimal>();
        var portfolioEquity = new PortfolioEquityAggregator();

        foreach (var node in nodes)
        {
            strategyPnL[node.StrategyId] = node.FinalPnL;

            foreach (var point in node.Equity.Points)
                portfolioEquity.AddPoint(point.Time, point.Value);
        }

        return new PortfolioBacktestResult
        {
            StrategyPnL = strategyPnL,
            SymbolPnL = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(adjustedSymbolPnL, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase),
            CapitalWeights = new Dictionary<int, decimal>(capitalWeights),
            PortfolioEquityTimeline = new Dictionary<DateTime, decimal>(portfolioEquity.Timeline)
        };
    }

    private static Dictionary<string, decimal> AggregateAdjustedSymbolPnL(
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal> symbolTimeframePnL)
    {
        var output = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        foreach (var kv in symbolTimeframePnL)
        {
            var symbol = ExtractSymbolFromSymbolTimeframeKey(kv.Key);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(symbol))
                continue;

            if (output.ContainsKey(symbol))
                output[symbol] += kv.Value;
            else
                output[symbol] = kv.Value;
        }

        return output;
    }

    private static string ExtractSymbolFromSymbolTimeframeKey(string key)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key))
            return string.Empty;

        var parts = key.Split(new[] { "::" }, StringSplitOptions.None);
        if (parts.Length < 2)
            return string.Empty;

        return parts[0].Trim();
    }

    private static decimal GetSymbolPnL(TradeLedger ledger, string symbol)
    {
        if (ledger.PnLBySymbol.TryGetValue(symbol, out var pnl))
            return pnl;

        return 0m;
    }

    private static int GetTradeCount(TradeLedger ledger)
    {
        return ledger.TotalTrades;
    }

    private static decimal EstimateFrictionCost(
        decimal positionValue,
        int tradeCount,
        FrictionProfile friction,
        IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles)
    {
        if (tradeCount <= 0 || positionValue <= 0m)
            return 0m;

        decimal averagePrice = candles.Count == 0
            ? 0m
            : candles.Average(c => c.Close);

        if (averagePrice <= 0m)
            return 0m;

        decimal grossTurnover = positionValue * tradeCount;

        decimal stress = friction.StressMultiplier <= 0m
            ? 1.0m
            : friction.StressMultiplier;

        decimal feeRate = BpsToRate(friction.EffectiveFeeBps);
        decimal slippageRate = BpsToRate(friction.BaseSlippageBps * stress);
        decimal spreadRate = BpsToRate(friction.BaseSpreadBps * stress);

        decimal feeCost = grossTurnover * feeRate;
        decimal slippageCost = grossTurnover * slippageRate;
        decimal spreadCost = grossTurnover * spreadRate;

        return feeCost + slippageCost + spreadCost;
    }

    private static decimal BpsToRate(decimal bps)
    {
        return bps / 10_000m;
    }

    private sealed class WaveBCandidate
    {
        public required MarketKey Market { get; init; }
        public decimal BasePreTradeScore { get; init; }
        public decimal NormalizedPreTradeScore { get; init; }
        public decimal TimeframePreferenceScore { get; init; }
        public decimal LiquidityScore { get; init; }
        public decimal LeadershipScore { get; init; }
        public decimal FinalScore { get; init; }
    }

    private sealed class WaveBSelectionSnapshot
    {
        public List<MarketKey> SelectedMarkets { get; init; } = new();
        public Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> AllocationWeights { get; init; } = new();
        public decimal CashWeight { get; init; }
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀I␀n␀t␀e␀r␀f␀a␀c␀e␀s␀\␀I␀C␀a␀n␀d␀l␀e␀D␀a␀t␀a␀F␀e␀e␀d␀.␀c␀s␀␀

␀namespace TQGA.Application.Paths;

public static class DataPaths
{
    public static readonly string DataRoot =
        @"D:\D DATA BACKUP\Data";

    public static readonly string Candles =
        Path.Combine(DataRoot, "Candles");

    public static readonly string Reports =
        Path.Combine(DataRoot, "Reports");

    public static readonly string OldReports =
        Path.Combine(DataRoot, "Old Reports");

    public static bool IsOldReports(string path) =>
        path.StartsWith(OldReports,
            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀C␀i␀o␀D␀y␀n␀a␀m␀i␀c␀R␀e␀a␀l␀l␀o␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀E␀n␀g␀i␀n␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀6␀.␀5␀3␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀7␀0␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class CioDynamicReallocationEngine
{
    private readonly decimal _minWeight;
    private readonly decimal _maxWeight;
    private readonly decimal _maxWeightPerSymbol;
    private readonly int _topK;

    public CioDynamicReallocationEngine(
        int topK = 6,
        decimal minWeight = 0.00m,
        decimal maxWeight = 0.35m,
        decimal maxWeightPerSymbol = 0.45m)
    {
        _topK = Math.Max(1, topK);
        _minWeight = Math.Max(0m, minWeight);
        _maxWeight = Math.Max(_minWeight, Math.Min(1.0m, maxWeight));
        _maxWeightPerSymbol = Math.Max(_maxWeight, Math.Min(1.0m, maxWeightPerSymbol));
    }

    public Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> ComputeWeights(Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> scoreByMarket)
    {
        if (scoreByMarket == null || scoreByMarket.Count == 0)
            return new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        var positive = scoreByMarket
            .Where(x => x.Value > 0m)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
            .ToList();

        if (positive.Count == 0)
            return new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        decimal topScore = positive[0].Value;
        decimal qualityFloor = Math.Max(1m, topScore * 0.15m);

        var selected = positive
            .Where(x => x.Value >= qualityFloor)
            .Take(_topK)
            .ToList();

        if (selected.Count == 0)
            return new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        // Convex spread: leaders get meaningfully higher weight than tail survivors.
        var raw = selected.ToDictionary(
            x => x.Key,
            x => ScoreToConvexWeight(x.Value, topScore));

        decimal rawSum = raw.Values.Sum();
        if (rawSum <= 0m)
            return new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        var normalized = raw.ToDictionary(
            x => x.Key,
            x => x.Value / rawSum);

        return EnforceConstraints(normalized);
    }

    private Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> EnforceConstraints(Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> weights)
    {
        if (weights.Count == 0)
            return weights;

        var working = weights.ToDictionary(x => x.Key, x => x.Value);

        for (int iteration = 0; iteration < 20; iteration++)
        {
            bool changed = false;

            // Per-market cap
            foreach (var key in working.Keys.ToList())
            {
                if (working[key] > _maxWeight)
                {
                    working[key] = _maxWeight;
                    changed = true;
                }
            }

            // Per-symbol cap across timeframes
            var bySymbol = working
                .GroupBy(x => x.Key.Symbol, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                .ToList();

            foreach (var symbolGroup in bySymbol)
            {
                decimal symbolTotal = symbolGroup.Sum(x => x.Value);
                if (symbolTotal <= _maxWeightPerSymbol)
                    continue;

                changed = true;

                decimal scale = symbolTotal <= 0m
                    ? 0m
                    : _maxWeightPerSymbol / symbolTotal;

                foreach (var kv in symbolGroup)
                    working[kv.Key] *= scale;
            }

            working = RedistributeResidual(working);

            if (!changed)
                break;
        }

        // Final cleanup
        working = working
            .Where(x => x.Value > 0m)
            .ToDictionary(x => x.Key, x => x.Value);

        decimal finalSum = working.Values.Sum();
        if (finalSum <= 0m)
            return new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        var normalizedFinal = working.ToDictionary(
            x => x.Key,
            x => x.Value / finalSum);

        // Optional floor only if mathematically possible
        if (_minWeight > 0m && normalizedFinal.Count > 0 && _minWeight * normalizedFinal.Count < 1m)
        {
            foreach (var key in normalizedFinal.Keys.ToList())
            {
                if (normalizedFinal[key] < _minWeight)
                    normalizedFinal[key] = _minWeight;
            }

            decimal sumAfterFloor = normalizedFinal.Values.Sum();
            if (sumAfterFloor > 0m)
            {
                normalizedFinal = normalizedFinal.ToDictionary(
                    x => x.Key,
                    x => x.Value / sumAfterFloor);
            }
        }

        return normalizedFinal
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
            .ToDictionary(x => x.Key, x => x.Value);
    }

    private Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> RedistributeResidual(Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal> working)
    {
        decimal sum = working.Values.Sum();
        if (sum <= 0m)
            return new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        if (Math.Abs(sum - 1m) < 0.000001m)
            return working;

        decimal residual = 1m - sum;
        if (residual <= 0m)
        {
            return working.ToDictionary(
                x => x.Key,
                x => x.Value / sum);
        }

        var eligible = working
            .Where(x => x.Value < _maxWeight)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
            .ToList();

        if (eligible.Count == 0)
            return working.ToDictionary(
                x => x.Key,
                x => x.Value / sum);

        decimal eligibleSum = eligible.Sum(x => x.Value);
        if (eligibleSum <= 0m)
        {
            decimal evenAdd = residual / eligible.Count;
            foreach (var kv in eligible)
                working[kv.Key] += evenAdd;
        }
        else
        {
            foreach (var kv in eligible)
            {
                decimal add = residual * (kv.Value / eligibleSum);
                working[kv.Key] = Math.Min(_maxWeight, working[kv.Key] + add);
            }
        }

        decimal newSum = working.Values.Sum();
        if (newSum <= 0m)
            return new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        return working.ToDictionary(
            x => x.Key,
            x => x.Value / newSum);
    }

    private static decimal ScoreToConvexWeight(decimal score, decimal topScore)
    {
        if (score <= 0m || topScore <= 0m)
            return 0m;

        decimal relative = score / topScore;

        // Convex transform:
        // weak survivors remain low-weight,
        // true leaders separate harder.
        return relative * relative * relative;
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀F␀r␀i␀c␀t␀i␀o␀n␀P␀r␀o␀f␀i␀l␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀0␀.␀6␀2␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀8␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed record FrictionProfile(
    decimal MakerFeeBps,
    decimal TakerFeeBps,
    decimal BaseSlippageBps,
    decimal BaseSpreadBps,
    decimal StressMultiplier = 1.0m,
    bool PreferMaker = false)
{
    public static FrictionProfile Default => new(
        MakerFeeBps: 2m,         // 0.02%
        TakerFeeBps: 10m,        // 0.10%
        BaseSlippageBps: 5m,     // 0.05%
        BaseSpreadBps: 3m,       // 0.03%
        StressMultiplier: 1.0m,
        PreferMaker: false);

    public decimal EffectiveFeeBps => PreferMaker ? MakerFeeBps : TakerFeeBps;
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀L␀e␀a␀d␀e␀r␀s␀h␀i␀p␀R␀a␀n␀k␀i␀n␀g␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀3␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀8␀3␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Application.Interfaces;

namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class LeadershipRankingService
{
    public IReadOnlyDictionary<MarketKey, decimal> RankMarkets(
        ICandleDataFeed feed,
        IEnumerable<string> symbols,
        IEnumerable<string> timeframes)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(feed);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(symbols);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(timeframes);

        var scores = new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        foreach (var symbol in symbols)
        {
            foreach (var timeframe in timeframes)
            {
                var candles = feed.GetCandles(symbol, timeframe)
                    .OrderBy(c => c.Time)
                    .TakeLast(160)
                    .ToList();

                if (candles.Count < 80)
                {
                    scores[new MarketKey(symbol, timeframe)] = decimal.MinValue;
                    continue;
                }

                var closes = candles.Select(c => c.Close).ToList();

                var ret20 = SafeReturn(closes, 20);
                var ret60 = SafeReturn(closes, 60);
                var slope20 = SafeSlope(closes, 20);
                var vol20 = SafeVol(closes, 20);

                // Favor strength + trend persistence.
                // Penalize too-dead / too-flat markets.
                var score =
                    (ret20 * 0.45m) +
                    (ret60 * 0.35m) +
                    (slope20 * 0.20m) +
                    (vol20 * 0.05m);

                scores[new MarketKey(symbol, timeframe)] = score;
            }
        }

        return scores;
    }

    private static decimal SafeReturn(List<decimal> closes, int lookback)
    {
        if (closes.Count <= lookback)
            return 0m;

        var start = closes[^lookback];
        var end = closes[^1];

        if (start == 0m)
            return 0m;

        return (end - start) / start;
    }

    private static decimal SafeSlope(List<decimal> closes, int lookback)
    {
        if (closes.Count <= lookback)
            return 0m;

        var segment = closes.TakeLast(lookback).ToList();
        var first = segment.First();
        var last = segment.Last();

        if (first == 0m)
            return 0m;

        return (last - first) / first / lookback;
    }

    private static decimal SafeVol(List<decimal> closes, int lookback)
    {
        if (closes.Count <= lookback + 1)
            return 0m;

        var segment = closes.TakeLast(lookback + 1).ToList();
        var returns = new List<decimal>();

        for (int i = 1; i < segment.Count; i++)
        {
            var prev = segment[i - 1];
            var cur = segment[i];

            if (prev == 0m)
                continue;

            returns.Add(Math.Abs((cur - prev) / prev));
        }

        if (returns.Count == 0)
            return 0m;

        return returns.Average();
    }
}

␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀M␀a␀r␀k␀e␀t␀K␀e␀y␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀0␀.␀1␀8␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀5␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public readonly record struct MarketKey(string Symbol, string Timeframe)
{
    public override string ToString() => $"{Symbol}_{Timeframe}";
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀B␀a␀c␀k␀t␀e␀s␀t␀O␀r␀c␀h␀e␀s␀t␀r␀a␀t␀o␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀4␀.␀2␀4␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀0␀6␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Services;
using TQGA.Application.Strategy;

namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator
{
    private readonly PortfolioBacktestRunner _runner;

    private readonly AlphaRankingReportService _alphaRanking;
    private readonly CioCapitalReportService _cioCapital;
    private readonly StrategyContributionReportService _strategyPnl;
    private readonly SymbolHeatmapReportService _symbolReport;
    private readonly PortfolioEquityReportService _portfolioEquity;
    private readonly PortfolioDrawdownReportService _portfolioDrawdown;

    public PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator(
        PortfolioBacktestRunner runner,
        AlphaRankingReportService alphaRanking,
        CioCapitalReportService cioCapital,
        StrategyContributionReportService strategyPnl,
        SymbolHeatmapReportService symbolReport,
        PortfolioEquityReportService portfolioEquity,
        PortfolioDrawdownReportService portfolioDrawdown)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(runner);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(alphaRanking);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(cioCapital);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(strategyPnl);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(symbolReport);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(portfolioEquity);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(portfolioDrawdown);

        _runner = runner;
        _alphaRanking = alphaRanking;
        _cioCapital = cioCapital;
        _strategyPnl = strategyPnl;
        _symbolReport = symbolReport;
        _portfolioEquity = portfolioEquity;
        _portfolioDrawdown = portfolioDrawdown;
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<Type> GetRegisteredStrategies()
    {
        return StrategyFactory.DiscoverConcreteStrategyTypes();
    }

    public Task<PortfolioBacktestResult> RunSelectedAsync(
        IReadOnlyList<Type> selectedStrategies,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        return RunSelectedAsync(
            selectedStrategies,
            BinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols,
            BinanceUniverse.Timeframes,
            FrictionProfile.Default,
            ct);
    }

    public Task<PortfolioBacktestResult> RunSelectedAsync(
        IReadOnlyList<Type> selectedStrategies,
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedTimeframes,
        FrictionProfile friction,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        return RunSelectedAsync(
            selectedStrategies,
            BinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols,
            selectedTimeframes,
            friction,
            ct);
    }

    public async Task<PortfolioBacktestResult> RunSelectedAsync(
        IReadOnlyList<Type> selectedStrategies,
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedSymbols,
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedTimeframes,
        FrictionProfile friction,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(selectedStrategies);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(selectedSymbols);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(selectedTimeframes);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(friction);

        if (selectedStrategies.Count == 0)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("No strategies selected.");

        var result = await _runner.RunAsync(
            selectedStrategies,
            selectedSymbols,
            selectedTimeframes,
            friction,
            ct);

        // REPORT 05 / ranking style output
        _alphaRanking.Generate(result.SymbolPnL);

        // REPORT 06 — now supports realistic market allocation if present
        if (result.HasMarketAllocationWeights)
        {
            _cioCapital.Generate(
                result.CapitalWeights,
                result.MarketAllocationWeights,
                result.CashAllocationWeight);
        }
        else
        {
            _cioCapital.Generate(result.CapitalWeights);
        }

        // Existing main reports
        _strategyPnl.Generate(result.StrategyPnL);
        _symbolReport.Generate(result.SymbolPnL);
        _portfolioEquity.Generate(result.PortfolioEquityTimeline);
        _portfolioDrawdown.Generate(result.PortfolioEquityTimeline);

        return result;
    }
}

␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀E␀q␀u␀i␀t␀y␀A␀g␀g␀r␀e␀g␀a␀t␀o␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀0␀.␀4␀5␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀3␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class PortfolioEquityAggregator
{
    private readonly SortedDictionary<DateTime, decimal> _timeline = new();

    public void AddPoint(DateTime time, decimal equity)
    {
        if (_timeline.ContainsKey(time))
            _timeline[time] += equity;
        else
            _timeline[time] = equity;
    }

    public IReadOnlyDictionary<DateTime, decimal> Timeline => _timeline;
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀R␀i␀s␀k␀B␀u␀d␀g␀e␀t␀E␀n␀g␀i␀n␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀9␀.␀5␀2␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀2␀2␀2␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Domain.Market;

namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class PortfolioRiskBudgetEngine
{
    public RiskBudgetDecision Evaluate(
        string symbol,
        string timeframe,
        IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles,
        decimal currentPortfolioEquity,
        decimal currentDrawdownPct,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal> openRiskBySymbol,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal> openRiskByCluster,
        decimal currentTotalOpenRiskPct)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(symbol);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(timeframe);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(candles);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(openRiskBySymbol);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(openRiskByCluster);

        if (candles.Count < 120)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, "REJECT: insufficient candles");
        }

        var last = candles[^1].Close;
        if (last <= 0m)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, "REJECT: invalid last price");
        }

        var atrPct = EstimateAtrPct(candles);
        if (atrPct <= 0m)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, "REJECT: invalid ATR");
        }

        var regime = DetectRegime(candles);
        var regimeMultiplier = regime switch
        {
            RiskRegime.HighVolUp => 1.00m,
            RiskRegime.TrendUp => 0.85m,
            RiskRegime.Range => 0.35m,
            RiskRegime.HighVolDown => 0.15m,
            RiskRegime.TrendDown => 0.10m,
            _ => 0m
        };

        if (regimeMultiplier <= 0m)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, $"REJECT: regime={regime}");
        }

        var cluster = ResolveCluster(symbol);

        const decimal maxPerSymbolRiskPct = 0.75m;   // 0.75% risk budget per symbol
        const decimal maxPerClusterRiskPct = 1.75m;  // 1.75% risk budget per cluster
        const decimal maxTotalOpenRiskPct = 3.00m;   // 3.00% total open portfolio risk

        var symbolOpen = openRiskBySymbol.TryGetValue(symbol, out var sRisk) ? sRisk : 0m;
        var clusterOpen = openRiskByCluster.TryGetValue(cluster, out var cRisk) ? cRisk : 0m;

        if (symbolOpen >= maxPerSymbolRiskPct)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, $"REJECT: per-symbol cap reached ({symbolOpen:F2}% >= {maxPerSymbolRiskPct:F2}%)");
        }

        if (clusterOpen >= maxPerClusterRiskPct)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, $"REJECT: per-cluster cap reached ({clusterOpen:F2}% >= {maxPerClusterRiskPct:F2}%)");
        }

        if (currentTotalOpenRiskPct >= maxTotalOpenRiskPct)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, $"REJECT: total portfolio risk cap reached ({currentTotalOpenRiskPct:F2}% >= {maxTotalOpenRiskPct:F2}%)");
        }

        var drawdownMultiplier = currentDrawdownPct switch
        {
            < 5m => 1.00m,
            < 10m => 0.70m,
            < 15m => 0.40m,
            _ => 0m
        };

        if (drawdownMultiplier <= 0m)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, $"REJECT: drawdown throttle active ({currentDrawdownPct:F2}%)");
        }

        // Base risk target per trade
        decimal baseRiskPct = 0.50m; // 0.50% of portfolio equity

        // Timeframe preference: your reports keep showing 4h dominance, so allow a small 4h premium.
        decimal timeframeMultiplier =
            timeframe.Equals("4h", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? 1.10m :
            timeframe.Equals("1h", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? 0.80m :
            0.75m;

        var allowedRiskPct = baseRiskPct * regimeMultiplier * drawdownMultiplier * timeframeMultiplier;

        var remainingSymbolRoom = Math.Max(0m, maxPerSymbolRiskPct - symbolOpen);
        var remainingClusterRoom = Math.Max(0m, maxPerClusterRiskPct - clusterOpen);
        var remainingPortfolioRoom = Math.Max(0m, maxTotalOpenRiskPct - currentTotalOpenRiskPct);

        allowedRiskPct = Math.Min(allowedRiskPct, remainingSymbolRoom);
        allowedRiskPct = Math.Min(allowedRiskPct, remainingClusterRoom);
        allowedRiskPct = Math.Min(allowedRiskPct, remainingPortfolioRoom);

        if (allowedRiskPct <= 0m)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, "REJECT: no remaining risk budget");
        }

        // ATR sizing:
        // position value = (portfolio equity * risk%) / ATR%
        // capped to avoid absurd sizing in very low-vol conditions
        var rawPositionValue = currentPortfolioEquity * (allowedRiskPct / 100m) / atrPct;
        var maxPositionValue = currentPortfolioEquity * 0.25m; // hard cap 25% of equity
        var positionValue = Math.Min(rawPositionValue, maxPositionValue);

        if (positionValue <= 0m)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, "REJECT: computed position value <= 0");
        }

        var quantity = positionValue / last;
        if (quantity <= 0m)
        {
            return RiskBudgetDecision.Reject(symbol, timeframe, "REJECT: computed quantity <= 0");
        }

        return new RiskBudgetDecision(
            IsAllowed: true,
            Symbol: symbol,
            Timeframe: timeframe,
            Cluster: cluster,
            Regime: regime.ToString(),
            AllowedRiskPct: allowedRiskPct,
            AtrPct: atrPct,
            PositionValue: positionValue,
            Quantity: quantity,
            Reason: "OK");
    }

    public static decimal EstimateAtrPct(IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles, int lookback = 14)
    {
        if (candles.Count < lookback + 1)
            return 0m;

        var slice = candles.TakeLast(lookback).ToList();
        decimal trSum = 0m;

        for (int i = 0; i < slice.Count; i++)
        {
            var cur = slice[i];
            var prevClose = i == 0 ? cur.Close : slice[i - 1].Close;

            var tr = Math.Max(
                cur.High - cur.Low,
                Math.Max(Math.Abs(cur.High - prevClose), Math.Abs(cur.Low - prevClose)));

            trSum += tr;
        }

        var atr = trSum / lookback;
        var last = slice[^1].Close;

        return last <= 0m ? 0m : atr / last;
    }

    private static RiskRegime DetectRegime(IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles)
    {
        var closes = candles.Select(c => c.Close).ToList();
        if (closes.Count < 120)
            return RiskRegime.Unknown;

        var ema21 = closes.TakeLast(21).Average();
        var ema50 = closes.TakeLast(50).Average();
        var ema120 = closes.TakeLast(120).Average();

        var avgAbsRet = AverageAbsReturn(candles.TakeLast(20).ToList());

        bool trendUp = ema21 > ema50 && ema50 > ema120;
        bool trendDown = ema21 < ema50 && ema50 < ema120;
        bool highVol = avgAbsRet >= 0.012m;

        if (trendUp && highVol) return RiskRegime.HighVolUp;
        if (trendUp) return RiskRegime.TrendUp;
        if (trendDown && highVol) return RiskRegime.HighVolDown;
        if (trendDown) return RiskRegime.TrendDown;
        return RiskRegime.Range;
    }

    private static decimal AverageAbsReturn(IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles)
    {
        if (candles.Count < 2)
            return 0m;

        decimal sum = 0m;
        int n = 0;

        for (int i = 1; i < candles.Count; i++)
        {
            var prev = candles[i - 1].Close;
            var cur = candles[i].Close;

            if (prev == 0m)
                continue;

            sum += Math.Abs((cur - prev) / prev);
            n++;
        }

        return n == 0 ? 0m : sum / n;
    }

    public static string ResolveCluster(string symbol)
    {
        if (new[] { "BTCUSDT", "ETHUSDT", "BNBUSDT", "SOLUSDT", "XRPUSDT", "AVAXUSDT" }.Contains(symbol, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return "Majors";

        if (new[] { "AAVEUSDT", "UNIUSDT", "MKRUSDT", "RUNEUSDT" }.Contains(symbol, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return "DeFi";

        if (new[] { "ICPUSDT", "RNDRUSDT", "FETUSDT", "GRTUSDT" }.Contains(symbol, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return "AI_Compute";

        if (new[] { "ORDIUSDT", "TIAUSDT", "INJUSDT", "SUIUSDT", "SEIUSDT", "JUPUSDT", "WIFUSDT", "ARBUSDT", "OPUSDT" }.Contains(symbol, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return "Narrative";

        return "Other";
    }

    public sealed record RiskBudgetDecision(
        bool IsAllowed,
        string Symbol,
        string Timeframe,
        string Cluster,
        string Regime,
        decimal AllowedRiskPct,
        decimal AtrPct,
        decimal PositionValue,
        decimal Quantity,
        string Reason)
    {
        public static RiskBudgetDecision Reject(string symbol, string timeframe, string reason) =>
            new(
                IsAllowed: false,
                Symbol: symbol,
                Timeframe: timeframe,
                Cluster: ResolveCluster(symbol),
                Regime: RiskRegime.Unknown.ToString(),
                AllowedRiskPct: 0m,
                AtrPct: 0m,
                PositionValue: 0m,
                Quantity: 0m,
                Reason: reason);
    }

    private enum RiskRegime
    {
        Unknown = 0,
        Range = 1,
        TrendUp = 2,
        TrendDown = 3,
        HighVolUp = 4,
        HighVolDown = 5
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀P␀r␀e␀T␀r␀a␀d␀e␀M␀a␀r␀k␀e␀t␀S␀e␀l␀e␀c␀t␀i␀o␀n␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀6␀.␀3␀3␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀5␀7␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Application.Interfaces;
using TQGA.Domain.Market;

namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class PreTradeMarketSelectionService
{
    public SelectionResult SelectMarkets(
        ICandleDataFeed feed,
        IReadOnlyList<string> symbols,
        IReadOnlyList<string> timeframes,
        int topN = 12)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(feed);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(symbols);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(timeframes);

        topN = Math.Max(1, topN);

        var leadership = new LeadershipRankingService()
            .RankMarkets(feed, symbols, timeframes);

        var accepted = new List<SelectedMarket>();
        var rejected = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        foreach (var symbol in symbols)
        {
            foreach (var timeframe in timeframes)
            {
                var market = new MarketKey(symbol, timeframe);

                var candles = feed.GetCandles(symbol, timeframe)
                    .OrderBy(c => c.Time)
                    .TakeLast(220)
                    .ToList();

                if (candles.Count < 120)
                {
                    rejected[$"{symbol}::{timeframe}"] = "REJECT: insufficient history";
                    continue;
                }

                var avgDollarVolume = candles.Average(c => c.Close * c.Volume);
                if (avgDollarVolume < 2_000_000m)
                {
                    rejected[$"{symbol}::{timeframe}"] = "REJECT: low liquidity";
                    continue;
                }

                var avgAbsReturn = ComputeAverageAbsoluteReturn(candles);
                if (avgAbsReturn < 0.006m)
                {
                    rejected[$"{symbol}::{timeframe}"] = "REJECT: dead / too low volatility";
                    continue;
                }

                var trend = ComputeTrendState(candles);
                if (trend is not MarketTrendState.TrendUp and not MarketTrendState.HighVolUp)
                {
                    rejected[$"{symbol}::{timeframe}"] = "REJECT: regime not trend/high-vol-up";
                    continue;
                }

                var maturity = ComputeTrendExtension(candles);
                if (maturity > 0.18m)
                {
                    rejected[$"{symbol}::{timeframe}"] = "REJECT: late / overextended trend";
                    continue;
                }

                leadership.TryGetValue(market, out var leadershipScore);

                decimal timeframeBonus = timeframe.Equals("4h", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                    ? 0.20m
                    : timeframe.Equals("1h", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                        ? 0.05m
                        : 0.00m;

                decimal regimeBonus = trend == MarketTrendState.HighVolUp ? 0.15m : 0.08m;
                decimal qualityPenalty = maturity * 0.50m;

                var finalScore = leadershipScore + timeframeBonus + regimeBonus - qualityPenalty;

                accepted.Add(new SelectedMarket(
                    market,
                    finalScore,
                    avgDollarVolume,
                    avgAbsReturn,
                    trend.ToString(),
                    maturity));
            }
        }

        var selected = accepted
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Score)
            .Take(topN)
            .ToList();

        var selectedSet = selected
            .Select(x => x.Market)
            .ToHashSet();

        foreach (var row in accepted.Where(x => !selectedSet.Contains(x.Market)))
        {
            rejected[$"{row.Market.Symbol}::{row.Market.Timeframe}"] =
                $"REJECT: outside top {topN} leadership set";
        }

        return new SelectionResult(
            selected,
            rejected);
    }

    private static decimal ComputeAverageAbsoluteReturn(IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles)
    {
        if (candles.Count < 2)
            return 0m;

        decimal sum = 0m;
        int n = 0;

        for (int i = 1; i < candles.Count; i++)
        {
            var prev = candles[i - 1].Close;
            var cur = candles[i].Close;

            if (prev == 0m)
                continue;

            sum += Math.Abs((cur - prev) / prev);
            n++;
        }

        return n == 0 ? 0m : sum / n;
    }

    private static MarketTrendState ComputeTrendState(IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles)
    {
        var closes = candles.Select(c => c.Close).ToList();
        if (closes.Count < 120)
            return MarketTrendState.Unknown;

        var emaFast = closes.TakeLast(21).Average();
        var emaMid = closes.TakeLast(50).Average();
        var emaSlow = closes.TakeLast(120).Average();

        var avgAbsRet = ComputeAverageAbsoluteReturn(candles);

        bool trendUp = emaFast > emaMid && emaMid > emaSlow;
        bool trendDown = emaFast < emaMid && emaMid < emaSlow;
        bool highVol = avgAbsRet >= 0.012m;

        if (trendUp && highVol) return MarketTrendState.HighVolUp;
        if (trendUp) return MarketTrendState.TrendUp;
        if (trendDown && highVol) return MarketTrendState.HighVolDown;
        if (trendDown) return MarketTrendState.TrendDown;
        return MarketTrendState.Range;
    }

    private static decimal ComputeTrendExtension(IReadOnlyList<Candle> candles)
    {
        var closes = candles.Select(c => c.Close).ToList();
        if (closes.Count < 120)
            return 0m;

        var last = closes[^1];
        var baseline = closes.TakeLast(120).Average();

        if (baseline == 0m)
            return 0m;

        return Math.Abs((last - baseline) / baseline);
    }

    public sealed record SelectionResult(
        IReadOnlyList<SelectedMarket> SelectedMarkets,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> RejectedMarkets);

    public sealed record SelectedMarket(
        MarketKey Market,
        decimal Score,
        decimal AverageDollarVolume,
        decimal AverageAbsoluteReturn,
        string RegimeLabel,
        decimal TrendExtension);

    private enum MarketTrendState
    {
        Unknown = 0,
        Range = 1,
        TrendUp = 2,
        TrendDown = 3,
        HighVolUp = 4,
        HighVolDown = 5
    }
}
