␀using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using TQGA.Application.Accounting;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Strategy;

namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class StrategyBacktestNode
{
    public int StrategyId { get; }
    public string StrategyName { get; }

    public TradeLedger Ledger { get; }
    public EquityCurve Equity { get; }

    public StrategyBacktestNode(
        int id,
        string name,
        TradeLedger ledger,
        EquityCurve equity)
    {
        StrategyId = id;
        StrategyName = name;
        Ledger = ledger;
        Equity = equity;
    }

    public decimal FinalPnL => Ledger.TotalPnL;
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀S␀t␀r␀a␀t␀e␀g␀y␀C␀a␀p␀i␀t␀a␀l␀A␀l␀l␀o␀c␀a␀t␀o␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀1␀.␀1␀2␀ ␀K␀B␀␀

␀using TQGA.Application.Risk;

namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

public sealed class StrategyCapitalAllocator : ICapitalAllocator
{
    private decimal _portfolioEquity;
    private decimal _strategyWeight;
    private decimal _strategyEquity;

    private const decimal RiskPerTrade = 0.01m; // 1%

    public decimal CurrentEquity => _strategyEquity;

    public void Seed(decimal portfolioCapital, decimal strategyWeight)
    {
        _portfolioEquity = portfolioCapital;
        _strategyWeight = strategyWeight;
        _strategyEquity = _portfolioEquity * _strategyWeight;
    }

    public decimal GetOrderSize(string symbol, decimal price)
    {
        if (price <= 0 || _strategyEquity <= 0)
            return 0;

        var riskCapital = _strategyEquity * RiskPerTrade;

        return riskCapital / price;
    }

    public void OnTradeClosed(decimal pnl)
    {
        _strategyEquity += pnl;
        _portfolioEquity += pnl;
    }

    public decimal GetAllocatedCapital()
        => _portfolioEquity * _strategyWeight;

    public decimal GetWeight()
        => _strategyWeight;
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀P␀o␀r␀t␀f␀o␀l␀i␀o␀\␀A␀l␀l␀o␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀R␀a␀n␀k␀B␀a␀s␀e␀d␀A␀l␀l␀o␀c␀a␀t␀o␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀3␀.␀3␀2␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀9␀3␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TQGA.Application.Portfolio.Allocation
{
    public class RankedMarket
    {
        public string Symbol { get; set; }
        public double Score { get; set; }
    }

    public class AllocationResult
    {
        public Dictionary<string, double> Weights { get; set; } = new();
        public double CashWeight { get; set; }
    }

    public class RankBasedAllocator
    {
        public int MinMarkets { get; set; } = 5;
        public int MaxMarkets { get; set; } = 10;
        public double MaxPerSymbol { get; set; } = 0.20; // 20%

        public AllocationResult Allocate(List<RankedMarket> markets)
        {
            var result = new AllocationResult();

            if (markets == null || markets.Count == 0)
            {
                result.CashWeight = 1.0;
                return result;
            }

            // Step 1: Sort by score
            var ranked = markets
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.Score)
                .Take(MaxMarkets)
                .ToList();

            // Step 2: Ensure minimum breadth
            if (ranked.Count < MinMarkets)
            {
                ranked = markets
                    .OrderByDescending(x => x.Score)
                    .Take(Math.Min(MinMarkets, markets.Count))
                    .ToList();
            }

            // Step 3: Convert scores to positive weights
            var minScore = ranked.Min(x => x.Score);
            var shifted = ranked.Select(x => new
            {
                x.Symbol,
                Weight = x.Score - minScore + 1e-6
            }).ToList();

            var total = shifted.Sum(x => x.Weight);

            var normalized = shifted.ToDictionary(
                x => x.Symbol,
                x => x.Weight / total
            );

            // Step 4: Apply cap
            var capped = new Dictionary<string, double>();
            double overflow = 0.0;

            foreach (var kv in normalized)
            {
                if (kv.Value > MaxPerSymbol)
                {
                    capped[kv.Key] = MaxPerSymbol;
                    overflow += kv.Value - MaxPerSymbol;
                }
                else
                {
                    capped[kv.Key] = kv.Value;
                }
            }

            // Step 5: Redistribute overflow
            var underCap = capped.Where(x => x.Value < MaxPerSymbol).ToList();

            if (underCap.Count > 0 && overflow > 0)
            {
                var underTotal = underCap.Sum(x => x.Value);

                foreach (var kv in underCap)
                {
                    var add = (kv.Value / underTotal) * overflow;
                    capped[kv.Key] += add;
                }
            }

            // Step 6: Final normalization safety
            var finalSum = capped.Sum(x => x.Value);
            var final = capped.ToDictionary(
                x => x.Key,
                x => x.Value / finalSum
            );

            result.Weights = final;

            // Step 7: Cash allocation (if not fully used)
            var used = result.Weights.Sum(x => x.Value);
            result.CashWeight = Math.Max(0, 1.0 - used);

            return result;
        }
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀i␀n␀g␀\␀B␀a␀c␀k␀t␀e␀s␀t␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀1␀.␀5␀9␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀5␀1␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Application.Accounting;

namespace TQGA.Application.Reporting;

public sealed class BacktestReport
{
    public decimal TotalPnL { get; }
    public int TotalTrades { get; }
    public int Wins { get; }
    public int Losses { get; }
    public decimal WinRate { get; }
    public decimal MaxDrawdown { get; }

    public BacktestReport(
        TradeLedger ledger,
        EquityCurve equity)
    {
        TotalPnL = ledger.TotalPnL;
        TotalTrades = ledger.TotalTrades;
        Wins = ledger.WinCount;
        Losses = ledger.LossCount;

        WinRate = TotalTrades == 0
            ? 0
            : (decimal)Wins / TotalTrades * 100m;

        MaxDrawdown = CalculateMaxDrawdown(equity.Points);
    }

    private static decimal CalculateMaxDrawdown(
        IReadOnlyList<(DateTime Time, decimal Value)> points)
    {
        decimal peak = decimal.MinValue;
        decimal maxDd = 0m;

        foreach (var p in points)
        {
            if (p.Value > peak)
                peak = p.Value;

            if (peak == 0)
                continue;

            var dd = (peak - p.Value) / peak * 100m;

            if (dd > maxDd)
                maxDd = dd;
        }

        return maxDd;
    }

    public override string ToString()
    {
        return
            $"Total Trades : {TotalTrades}\n" +
            $"Wins         : {Wins}\n" +
            $"Losses       : {Losses}\n" +
            $"Win Rate     : {WinRate:F2}%\n" +
            $"Total PnL    : {TotalPnL:F2}\n" +
            $"Max Drawdown : {MaxDrawdown:F2}";
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀i␀n␀g␀\␀C␀o␀i␀n␀P␀e␀r␀f␀o␀r␀m␀a␀n␀c␀e␀A␀n␀a␀l␀y␀z␀e␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀2␀.␀6␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀5␀9␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Domain.Trading;

namespace TQGA.Application.Reporting;

public sealed class CoinPerformanceAnalyzer
{
    private readonly IReadOnlyList<Trade> _trades;

    public CoinPerformanceAnalyzer(IReadOnlyList<Trade> trades)
    {
        _trades = trades.Where(t => t.IsClosed).ToList();
    }

    public string BuildReport()
    {
        if (_trades.Count == 0)
            return "\nNo closed trades → coin analytics unavailable.\n";

        var grouped = _trades
            .GroupBy(t => t.Symbol)
            .Select(g =>
            {
                var trades = g.ToList();

                var wins = trades.Where(t => t.RealizedPnL > 0).ToList();
                var losses = trades.Where(t => t.RealizedPnL < 0).ToList();

                var total = trades.Count;

                var pnl = trades.Sum(t => t.RealizedPnL);

                var avgWin = wins.Any() ? wins.Average(t => t.RealizedPnL) : 0;
                var avgLoss = losses.Any() ? losses.Average(t => t.RealizedPnL) : 0;

                var winRate = total == 0 ? 0 : (decimal)wins.Count / total;

                var grossWin = wins.Sum(t => t.RealizedPnL);
                var grossLoss = losses.Sum(t => Math.Abs(t.RealizedPnL));

                var pf = grossLoss == 0 ? 0 : grossWin / grossLoss;

                var expectancy =
                    (winRate * avgWin) -
                    ((1 - winRate) * Math.Abs(avgLoss));

                return new
                {
                    Symbol = g.Key,
                    Trades = total,
                    PnL = pnl,
                    WinRate = winRate * 100,
                    AvgWin = avgWin,
                    AvgLoss = avgLoss,
                    PF = pf,
                    Expectancy = expectancy
                };
            })
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Expectancy)
            .ToList();

        var lines = new List<string>();

        lines.Add("\n===== COIN PERFORMANCE MATRIX =====\n");
        lines.Add("Symbol | Trades | Win% | PnL | AvgWin | AvgLoss | PF | Expectancy");
        lines.Add("-------------------------------------------------------------------");

        foreach (var x in grouped)
        {
            lines.Add(
                $"{x.Symbol,-7} | {x.Trades,6} | {x.WinRate,5:F1} | {x.PnL,8:F0} | {x.AvgWin,7:F0} | {x.AvgLoss,8:F0} | {x.PF,4:F2} | {x.Expectancy,10:F2}");
        }

        lines.Add("\nTOP ALPHA MARKET → " + grouped.First().Symbol);
        lines.Add("WORST MARKET     → " + grouped.Last().Symbol);

        return string.Join("\n", lines);
    }
}

␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀5␀5␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Accounting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;
using TQGA.Domain.Trading;

namespace TQGA.Application.Reporting;

public sealed class PortfolioResearchReport
{
    private readonly TradeLedger _ledger;

    public PortfolioResearchReport(TradeLedger ledger)
    {
        _ledger = ledger;
    }

    public void Generate()
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        var timestamp = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss");

        var path = Path.Combine(
            DataPaths.Reports,
            $"REPORT 03_PORTFOLIO_{timestamp}.txt");

        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("UNIVERSAL PORTFOLIO RESEARCH REPORT");
        sb.AppendLine("===================================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        if (!_ledger.Trades.Any())
        {
            sb.AppendLine("⚠ NO TRADES EXECUTED");
            sb.AppendLine("Possible causes:");
            sb.AppendLine("- Entry alignment never occurred");
            sb.AppendLine("- Risk manager blocking");
            sb.AppendLine("- Position already open on signals");
            File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString());
            return;
        }

        var byCoin = _ledger.Trades
            .GroupBy(t => t.Symbol)
            .Select(g => new
            {
                Symbol = g.Key,
                Trades = g.Count(),
                PnL = g.Sum(x => x.RealizedPnL),
                Wins = g.Count(x => x.RealizedPnL > 0)
            })
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.PnL);

        sb.AppendLine("COIN PERFORMANCE");
        sb.AppendLine("----------------");

        foreach (var c in byCoin)
        {
            var winRate = c.Trades == 0 ? 0 :
                (decimal)c.Wins / c.Trades * 100m;

            sb.AppendLine(
                $"{c.Symbol} | Trades: {c.Trades} | PnL: {c.PnL:F2} | WinRate: {winRate:F2}%");
        }

        File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString());
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀

public static class StrategyExplainabilityWriter

            "- Risk manager blocking entries\n" +

        );

        sb.AppendLine("RSI Momentum Filter     : 100 / 100");
        sb.AppendLine("Risk Alignment          : 100 / 100");
        sb.AppendLine("Timing Discipline       : 100 / 100");
        sb.AppendLine("Noise Protection        : 100 / 100");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("ADVANCED KPI INSIGHT");
        sb.AppendLine("--------------------");
        sb.AppendLine(
            "- Signal Selectivity      : High\n" +
            "- Trade Frequency Control : Strict\n" +
            "- Overfitting Resistance  : Strong\n" +
            "- R-Multiple Philosophy   : Expectancy driven, not win-rate driven\n"
        );

        File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString());
    }
}

␀using TQGA.Domain.Trading;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;
namespace TQGA.Application.Reporting;

public static class TradeCsvExporter
{
    public static void Export(
        IEnumerable<Trade> trades,
        string fileName)
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        var path = Path.Combine(
            DataPaths.Reports, fileName);

        using var writer = new StreamWriter(path);

        writer.WriteLine(
            "Symbol,Side,Quantity,EntryTime,EntryPrice,ExitTime,ExitPrice,PnL");

        foreach (var t in trades)
        {
            writer.WriteLine(
                $"{t.Symbol},{t.Side},{t.Quantity},{t.EntryTime},{t.EntryPrice},{t.ExitTime},{t.ExitPrice},{t.RealizedPnL}");
        }
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀i␀n␀g␀\␀T␀r␀a␀d␀e␀E␀x␀p␀e␀c␀t␀a␀n␀c␀y␀A␀n␀a␀l␀y␀z␀e␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀1␀.␀6␀6␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀4␀1␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Domain.Trading;

namespace TQGA.Application.Reporting;

public sealed class TradeExpectancyAnalyzer
{
    public decimal Expectancy { get; }
    public decimal AvgWin { get; }
    public decimal AvgLoss { get; }
    public decimal ProfitFactor { get; }
    public decimal WinRate { get; }
    public int TotalTrades { get; }

    public TradeExpectancyAnalyzer(IReadOnlyList<Trade> trades)
    {
        var closed = trades.Where(t => t.IsClosed).ToList();

        TotalTrades = closed.Count;

        if (TotalTrades == 0)
            return;

        var wins = closed.Where(t => t.RealizedPnL > 0).ToList();
        var losses = closed.Where(t => t.RealizedPnL < 0).ToList();

        AvgWin = wins.Any() ? wins.Average(t => t.RealizedPnL) : 0;
        AvgLoss = losses.Any() ? losses.Average(t => t.RealizedPnL) : 0;

        WinRate = (decimal)wins.Count / TotalTrades;

        var grossWin = wins.Sum(t => t.RealizedPnL);
        var grossLoss = losses.Sum(t => Math.Abs(t.RealizedPnL));

        ProfitFactor = grossLoss == 0 ? 0 : grossWin / grossLoss;

        Expectancy =
            (WinRate * AvgWin) -
            ((1 - WinRate) * Math.Abs(AvgLoss));
    }

    public override string ToString()
    {
        return
            "\n====== EXPECTANCY REPORT ======\n" +
            $"Total Trades  : {TotalTrades}\n" +
            $"Win Rate      : {WinRate:P2}\n" +
            $"Avg Win       : {AvgWin:F2}\n" +
            $"Avg Loss      : {AvgLoss:F2}\n" +
            $"Profit Factor : {ProfitFactor:F2}\n" +
            $"Expectancy    : {Expectancy:F2}\n" +
            "===============================\n";
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀R␀i␀s␀k␀\␀I␀C␀a␀p␀i␀t␀a␀l␀A␀l␀l␀o␀c␀a␀t␀o␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀

␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀9␀␀

␀namespace TQGA.Application.Risk;

public interface ICapitalAllocator
{
    void Seed(decimal portfolioCapital, decimal strategyWeight);
    //void Seed(decimal portfolioCapital, decimal strategyWeight);

    decimal GetOrderSize(string symbol, decimal price);

    void OnTradeClosed(decimal pnl);

    decimal CurrentEquity { get; }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀R␀i␀s␀k␀\␀I␀R␀i␀s␀k␀M␀a␀n␀a␀g␀e␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀8␀4␀A␀l␀p␀h␀a␀D␀e␀c␀a␀y␀M␀o␀n␀i␀t␀o␀r␀i␀n␀g␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀6␀.␀0␀5␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀3␀3␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

/// <summary>
/// A84 special reports:
/// Alpha Decay Monitoring using portfolio equity timeline only.
/// No changes to existing report structures.
/// </summary>
public sealed class A84AlphaDecayMonitoringReportService
{
    public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult result)
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        var equity = result?.PortfolioEquityTimeline;
        if (equity == null || equity.Count < 20)
        {
            Write("A84_03", "A84_03 — ALPHA DECAY (PORTFOLIO)",
                "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is missing or too small.");
            Write("A84_04", "A84_04 — ALPHA DECAY (ALERTS)",
                "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline is missing or too small.");
            return;
        }

        var pts = equity.OrderBy(x => x.Key).Select(x => (t: x.Key, v: x.Value)).ToList();

        // Split into early vs late segments (50/50)
        var half = pts.Count / 2;
        var early = pts.Take(half).ToList();
        var late = pts.Skip(half).ToList();

        var earlyRet = SegmentReturn(early);
        var lateRet = SegmentReturn(late);

        // Rolling window decay scan (detect recent deterioration)
        var decayScan = RollingDecayScan(pts, window: Math.Max(20, pts.Count / 10));

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine("A84_03 — ALPHA DECAY (PORTFOLIO)");
        sb.AppendLine("================================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine($"Points            : {pts.Count}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Start equity       : {pts.First().v:F2}");
        sb.AppendLine($"End equity         : {pts.Last().v:F2}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("SEGMENT PERFORMANCE");
        sb.AppendLine("-------------------");
        sb.AppendLine($"Early 50% return   : {earlyRet * 100m:F2}%");
        sb.AppendLine($"Late  50% return   : {lateRet * 100m:F2}%");

        var decayRatio = (earlyRet == 0m) ? 0m : (lateRet / earlyRet);
        sb.AppendLine($"Decay ratio (late/early): {decayRatio:F3}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("ROLLING DECAY SCAN (latest first)");
        sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------");
        sb.AppendLine("Window uses simple return over last N points; compares recent window vs previous window.");
        sb.AppendLine();

        foreach (var r in decayScan.Take(12))
        {
            sb.AppendLine(
                $"{r.endTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} | recent {r.recent * 100m,8:F2}% | prev {r.prev * 100m,8:F2}% | delta {(r.recent - r.prev) * 100m,8:F2}%");
        }

        WriteRaw("A84_03", sb.ToString());

        // Alerts
        var alerts = new List<string>();

        if (lateRet < 0 && earlyRet > 0)
            alerts.Add("ALERT: Late-half performance turned negative while early-half was positive (classic alpha decay).");

        if (decayRatio > 0 && decayRatio < 0.50m && earlyRet > 0.02m)
            alerts.Add("ALERT: Late/early decay ratio < 0.50 while early return was meaningful.");

        var worst = decayScan.OrderBy(x => x.recent - x.prev).FirstOrDefault();
        if (worst.endTime != default && (worst.recent - worst.prev) < -0.05m)
            alerts.Add($"ALERT: Sharp rolling deterioration detected near {worst.endTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}.");

        var sb2 = new StringBuilder();
        sb2.AppendLine("A84_04 — ALPHA DECAY (ALERTS)");
        sb2.AppendLine("=============================");
        sb2.AppendLine();

        if (alerts.Count == 0)
        {
            sb2.AppendLine("NO ALERTS: No strong decay signal under current thresholds.");
        }
        else
        {
            foreach (var a in alerts)
                sb2.AppendLine(a);
        }

        sb2.AppendLine();
        sb2.AppendLine("NEXT ACTIONS (OPERATOR)");
        sb2.AppendLine("------------------------");
        sb2.AppendLine("1) If decay alerts persist across runs, reduce position sizing and re-rank markets/strategies.");
        sb2.AppendLine("2) Add per-market equity curves (future upgrade) to localize decay to SYMBOL::TF.");
        sb2.AppendLine("3) Add slippage/fee model before trusting absolute PnL.");

        WriteRaw("A84_04", sb2.ToString());
    }

    private static decimal SegmentReturn(List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> seg)
    {
        if (seg.Count < 2) return 0m;
        var start = seg.First().v;
        var end = seg.Last().v;
        if (start == 0) return 0m;
        return (end - start) / start;
    }

    private static List<(DateTime endTime, decimal recent, decimal prev)> RollingDecayScan(
        List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> pts,
        int window)
    {
        var list = new List<(DateTime endTime, decimal recent, decimal prev)>();

        // Need two windows back-to-back
        var step = Math.Max(1, window / 2);

        for (int end = pts.Count - 1; end >= (2 * window); end -= step)
        {
            var recentSeg = pts.Skip(end - window + 1).Take(window).ToList();
            var prevSeg = pts.Skip(end - (2 * window) + 1).Take(window).ToList();

            var recent = SegmentReturn(recentSeg);
            var prev = SegmentReturn(prevSeg);

            list.Add((pts[end].t, recent, prev));
        }

        return list;
    }

    private static void Write(string prefix, string title, string body)
    {
        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine(title);
        sb.AppendLine(new string('=', title.Length));
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine(body);
        WriteRaw(prefix, sb.ToString());
    }

    private static void WriteRaw(string prefix, string content)
    {
        var path = Path.Combine(
            DataPaths.Reports,
            $"{prefix}_ALPHA_DECAY_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt");

        File.WriteAllText(path, content);
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀8␀4␀C␀h␀a␀t␀G␀p␀t␀U␀p␀l␀o␀a␀d␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀7␀.␀5␀1␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀4␀3␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

/// <summary>
/// Produces a compact (ChatGPT-paste-friendly) summary of the key system outputs.
/// Target size: ~3–4 KB, with 5–10 lines per major section.
/// </summary>
public sealed class A84ChatGptUploadReportService
{
    public void GenerateAndWrite(
        PortfolioBacktestResult result,
        DateTime runUtc,
        IReadOnlyList<Type> selectedStrategies,
        Dictionary<int, StrategyFitnessSnapshot>? fitness,
        HashSet<int>? allowedStrategyIds,
        Dictionary<string, decimal>? cioWeightsPostGating)
    {
        if (result == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(result));
        if (selectedStrategies == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(selectedStrategies));

        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        fitness ??= new Dictionary<int, StrategyFitnessSnapshot>();
        allowedStrategyIds ??= new HashSet<int>();
        cioWeightsPostGating ??= new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        var sb = new StringBuilder(capacity: 5000);

        var ts = runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss");
        var outFile = Path.Combine(
            DataPaths.Reports,
            $"A84_06_CHATGPT_UPLOAD_{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}_{ts}.txt".Replace($"{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}_{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}", runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd")));

        // ---------- Header ----------
        sb.AppendLine("A84_06 — CHATGPT UPLOAD (COMPACT)");
        sb.AppendLine("================================");
        sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- Architecture state ----------
        sb.AppendLine("TQGA — ARCHITECTURE STATE (Institutional Mode)");
        sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------------------");
        sb.AppendLine("• Market grid: Top20 symbols × 3 TF (1h, 4h, 1d) => 60 markets.");
        sb.AppendLine("• Backtest: Strategy × Market grid; captures StrategyPnL, SymbolPnL, Symbol×TF PnL, Strategy×Symbol×TF PnL.");
        sb.AppendLine("• CIO: ranks markets by PnL score (per Symbol×TF) then allocates with caps (per-market + per-symbol).");
        sb.AppendLine("• Fitness gating: kills dead strategies (0 trades / low PnL / fitness<=0) before CIO recompute.");
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- Run scope ----------
        sb.AppendLine("RUN SCOPE");
        sb.AppendLine("---------");
        sb.AppendLine($"Strategies Selected : {selectedStrategies.Count}");
        for (int i = 0; i < Math.Min(10, selectedStrategies.Count); i++)
            sb.AppendLine($"  S{i + 1:00}  {selectedStrategies[i].Name}");
        if (selectedStrategies.Count > 10) sb.AppendLine("  ...");
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- Portfolio snapshot ----------
        sb.AppendLine("PORTFOLIO SNAPSHOT");
        sb.AppendLine("------------------");
        var startEq = 100000m;
        var endEq = TryGetEndEquity(result, startEq);
        var retPct = startEq <= 0 ? 0m : ((endEq - startEq) / startEq) * 100m;

        sb.AppendLine($"Start Equity : {startEq:0.00}");
        sb.AppendLine($"End Equity   : {endEq:0.00}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Total Return : {retPct:0.00}%");
        sb.AppendLine($"Equity Points: {result.PortfolioEquityTimeline?.Count ?? 0}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- Top strategies ----------
        sb.AppendLine("TOP STRATEGIES (PnL)");
        sb.AppendLine("--------------------");
        foreach (var x in (result.StrategyPnL ?? new Dictionary<int, decimal>())
                     .OrderByDescending(k => k.Value)
                     .Take(6))
        {
            sb.AppendLine($"S{x.Key:00}  PnL {x.Value:0.00}");
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- Fitness / gating ----------
        sb.AppendLine("FITNESS GATING (summary)");
        sb.AppendLine("------------------------");
        if (fitness.Count == 0)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("No fitness snapshot available.");
        }
        else
        {
            foreach (var row in fitness.Values
                         .OrderByDescending(r => r.FitnessScore)
                         .Take(6))
            {
                sb.AppendLine($"{row.StrategyCode} | PnL {row.PnL:0.00} | Trades {row.Trades} | Fit {row.FitnessScore:0.000} | Allowed {row.Allowed} | {row.GateReason}");
            }

            sb.AppendLine($"Allowed Strategies: {(allowedStrategyIds.Count == 0 ? "NONE" : string.Join(",", allowedStrategyIds.OrderBy(x => x).Select(x => $"S{x:00}")))}");
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- Top markets ----------
        sb.AppendLine("TOP MARKETS (Symbol×TF PnL)");
        sb.AppendLine("---------------------------");
        foreach (var kv in (result.SymbolTimeframePnL ?? new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                     .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
                     .Take(10))
        {
            sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key}  PnL {kv.Value:0.00}");
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- CIO allocation post-gating ----------
        sb.AppendLine("CIO ALLOCATION (POST-GATING, Top 10)");
        sb.AppendLine("-----------------------------------");
        if (cioWeightsPostGating.Count == 0)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("No CIO post-gating weights available.");
        }
        else
        {
            foreach (var kv in cioWeightsPostGating
                         .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
                         .Take(10))
            {
                sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key}  W {(kv.Value * 100m):0.00}%");
            }
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- Walk-forward + realism checklist ----------
        sb.AppendLine("REALISM / SURVIVAL CHECKLIST (minimum)");
        sb.AppendLine("--------------------------------------");
        sb.AppendLine("• Walk-forward: split history into sequential windows; tune on train, validate on next window only.");
        sb.AppendLine("• Friction: add fees + slippage + spread; stress with 2× and 4× friction multipliers.");
        sb.AppendLine("• Regime robustness: require stable performance across multiple regime buckets (trend/range/volatile).");
        sb.AppendLine("• Risk limits: max exposure per symbol, max drawdown stop, and kill-switch for degraded fitness.");
        sb.AppendLine("• No-leakage: indicators must use only past candles; avoid using final equity to pick parameters.");
        sb.AppendLine();

        // ---------- What to upload ----------
        sb.AppendLine("WHAT TO UPLOAD TO CHATGPT");
        sb.AppendLine("-------------------------");
        sb.AppendLine("1) This file (A84_06_CHATGPT_UPLOAD)");
        sb.AppendLine("2) A84_00 Executive Summary");
        sb.AppendLine("3) A84_05 Strategy Fitness + CIO Gating");
        sb.AppendLine("4) REPORT_11 Symbol×TF PnL and REPORT_12 CIO weights");
        sb.AppendLine();

        File.WriteAllText(outFile, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8);
    }

    private static decimal TryGetEndEquity(PortfolioBacktestResult result, decimal fallback)
    {
        if (result.PortfolioEquityTimeline == null || result.PortfolioEquityTimeline.Count == 0)
            return fallback;

        // SortedDictionary<DateTime, decimal> => last value is end equity
        return result.PortfolioEquityTimeline.Last().Value;
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀8␀4␀E␀x␀e␀c␀u␀t␀i␀v␀e␀S␀u␀m␀m␀a␀r␀y␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀5␀.␀5␀9␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀1␀6␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

public sealed class A84ExecutiveSummaryReportService
{
    public void GenerateAndWrite(
        PortfolioBacktestResult result,
        DateTime runUtc,
        IReadOnlyList<Type> selectedStrategies,
        Dictionary<string, decimal> cioWeightsFinal,
        int recentMinutesWindow = 10)
    {
        var ts = runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss");
        var outFile = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"A84_00_EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY_{runUtc:yyyyMMdd}_{ts}.txt");

        // Equity timeline
        var eq = result.PortfolioEquityTimeline;
        var equityPoints = eq.Count;
        var startTime = eq.Count > 0 ? eq.Keys.Min() : DateTime.MinValue;
        var endTime = eq.Count > 0 ? eq.Keys.Max() : DateTime.MinValue;
        var startEquity = eq.Count > 0 ? eq[startTime] : 0m;
        var endEquity = eq.Count > 0 ? eq[endTime] : 0m;
        var totalReturnPct = (startEquity <= 0m) ? 0m : ((endEquity / startEquity) - 1m) * 100m;

        // Strategy list
        var strategyLines = selectedStrategies
            .Select((t, idx) => $"  S{idx + 1:00}  {t.Name}")
            .ToList();

        // Top strategies
        var topStrategies = result.StrategyPnL
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
            .Select(x => $"S{x.Key:00}  {PadRightSafe(StrategyNameFromSelection(selectedStrategies, x.Key), 28)}  PnL  {x.Value,14:0.00}")
            .ToList();

        // Top markets by PnL (Strategy-agnostic market view)
        var topMarkets = result.SymbolTimeframePnL
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
            .Take(30)
            .Select(x => $"{PadRightSafe(x.Key.Replace("::", "::"), 22)}  PnL  {x.Value,14:0.00}")
            .ToList();

        // Recent files confirmation
        var recentFiles = new List<string>();
        try
        {
            if (Directory.Exists(DataPaths.Reports))
            {
                var cutoff = runUtc.AddMinutes(-recentMinutesWindow);
                recentFiles = Directory
                    .GetFiles(DataPaths.Reports)
                    .Select(f => new FileInfo(f))
                    .Where(fi => fi.LastWriteTimeUtc >= cutoff && fi.LastWriteTimeUtc <= runUtc.AddMinutes(1))
                    .OrderByDescending(fi => fi.LastWriteTimeUtc)
                    .Take(50)
                    .Select(fi => $"{fi.LastWriteTimeUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}  {fi.Name}")
                    .ToList();
            }
        }
        catch
        {
            // best-effort only
        }

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine("A84_00 — EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (INSTITUTIONAL CONFIRMATION)");
        sb.AppendLine("======================================================");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("RUN SCOPE");
        sb.AppendLine("---------");
        sb.AppendLine($"Strategies Selected : {selectedStrategies.Count}");
        foreach (var line in strategyLines) sb.AppendLine(line);
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("PORTFOLIO PERFORMANCE SNAPSHOT");
        sb.AppendLine("------------------------------");
        sb.AppendLine($"Equity Points   : {equityPoints}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Start Time (UTC): {startTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}");
        sb.AppendLine($"End Time (UTC)  : {endTime:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Start Equity    : {startEquity:0.00}");
        sb.AppendLine($"End Equity      : {endEquity:0.00}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Total Return    : {totalReturnPct:0.00}%");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("TOP STRATEGIES (by PnL)");
        sb.AppendLine("-----------------------");
        foreach (var line in topStrategies) sb.AppendLine(line);
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("TOP MARKETS (SYMBOL × TF by PnL)");
        sb.AppendLine("-------------------------------");
        foreach (var line in topMarkets) sb.AppendLine(line);
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("CIO ALLOCATION (TOP 20 weights) — POST GATING");
        sb.AppendLine("--------------------------------------------");
        foreach (var w in cioWeightsFinal.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(20))
            sb.AppendLine($"{PadRightSafe(w.Key, 26)}  W  {w.Value:P2}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("OUTPUT CONFIRMATION (Recent files in Reports folder)");
        sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------------------------");
        sb.AppendLine($"Reports Folder : {DataPaths.Reports}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Recent Window  : last {recentMinutesWindow} minutes (UTC)");
        sb.AppendLine($"Recent Files   : {recentFiles.Count}");
        sb.AppendLine();
        foreach (var rf in recentFiles) sb.AppendLine(rf);

        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);
        File.WriteAllText(outFile, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8);
    }

    private static string StrategyNameFromSelection(IReadOnlyList<Type> selected, int strategyId)
    {
        // Your StrategyPnL keys are ints (1..N) by selection order in your system.
        // If your IDs differ, it still safely resolves.
        var idx = strategyId - 1;
        if (idx >= 0 && idx < selected.Count) return selected[idx].Name;
        return $"Strategy_{strategyId}";
    }

    private static string PadRightSafe(string s, int len)
    {
        s ??= "";
        return s.Length >= len ? s.Substring(0, len) : s.PadRight(len);
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀8␀4␀M␀a␀r␀k␀e␀t␀R␀e␀g␀i␀m␀e␀D␀e␀t␀e␀c␀t␀i␀o␀n␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀8␀.␀1␀7␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀9␀8␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

/// <summary>
/// A84 special reports orchestrator:
/// - A84_01 / A84_01B / A84_01C via A84_RegimeResearchService (cross-sectional)
/// - A84_02 / A84_02B via portfolio equity timeline (time-series)
/// 
/// IMPORTANT:
/// This class MUST NOT share name/members with A84AlphaDecayMonitoringReportService.
/// Keep helper method names unique to prevent accidental ambiguity if pasting mistakes happen.
/// </summary>
public sealed class A84MarketRegimeDetectionReportService
{
    private readonly A84_RegimeResearchService _regime = new();

    public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult result)
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        if (result == null)
        {
            WriteReportText("A84_01_MARKET_REGIME", "A84_01 — MARKET REGIME", "NO DATA: PortfolioBacktestResult is null.");
            WriteReportText("A84_02_REGIME_TRANSITIONS", "A84_02 — REGIME TRANSITIONS", "NO DATA: PortfolioBacktestResult is null.");
            return;
        }

        // -------- A84_01 (cross-sectional regime map + ranking + CIO overlay) --------
        var pnl = result.SymbolTimeframePnL ?? new Dictionary<string, decimal>();

        // CIO weights may be keyed as "CIO::SYMBOL::TF" or "SYMBOL::TF"
        var cioRaw = result.CioSymbolTimeframeWeights ?? new Dictionary<string, decimal>();
        var cioAligned = AlignCioWeightsToSymbolTf(cioRaw);

        _regime.Generate(pnl, cioAligned);

        // -------- A84_02 (portfolio regime transitions based on equity time-series) --------
        GeneratePortfolioRegimeTransitions(result.PortfolioEquityTimeline);
    }

    private static Dictionary<string, decimal> AlignCioWeightsToSymbolTf(Dictionary<string, decimal> cioRaw)
    {
        var aligned = new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        foreach (var kv in cioRaw)
        {
            var key = kv.Key ?? "";
            var w = kv.Value;

            if (w <= 0) continue;

            if (key.StartsWith("CIO::", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                key = key.Substring("CIO::".Length);

            aligned[key] = w;
        }

        // Normalize to sum=1
        var sum = aligned.Values.Sum();
        if (sum > 0)
        {
            var keys = aligned.Keys.ToList();
            foreach (var k in keys)
                aligned[k] = aligned[k] / sum;
        }

        return aligned;
    }

    private void GeneratePortfolioRegimeTransitions(IReadOnlyDictionary<DateTime, decimal> equityTimeline)
    {
        if (equityTimeline == null || equityTimeline.Count < 30)
        {
            WriteReportText(
                "A84_02_REGIME_TRANSITIONS",
                "A84_02 — REGIME TRANSITIONS (PORTFOLIO)",
                "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline missing or too small.");

            WriteReportText(
                "A84_02B_REGIME_STATS",
                "A84_02B — REGIME STATS (PORTFOLIO)",
                "NO DATA: PortfolioEquityTimeline missing or too small.");

            return;
        }

        var pts = equityTimeline
            .OrderBy(x => x.Key)
            .Select(x => (t: x.Key, v: x.Value))
            .ToList();

        // Window heuristic
        int window = Math.Max(20, pts.Count / 15);

        var labels = new List<(DateTime t, string regime, decimal slope, decimal vol)>();

        for (int i = window; i < pts.Count; i++)
        {
            var slice = pts.Skip(i - window).Take(window).ToList();

            var slope = EstimateSlopePerStep(slice);
            var vol = EstimateVolOfStepReturns(slice);

            var regime = ClassifyPortfolioRegime(slope, vol);

            labels.Add((pts[i].t, regime, slope, vol));
        }

        // ---- A84_02 transitions ----
        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine("A84_02 — REGIME TRANSITIONS (PORTFOLIO)");
        sb.AppendLine("=======================================");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine($"Window          : {window} points");
        sb.AppendLine($"Points analyzed : {labels.Count}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        string? prev = null;
        DateTime? start = null;

        foreach (var x in labels)
        {
            if (prev == null)
            {
                prev = x.regime;
                start = x.t;
                continue;
            }

            if (!string.Equals(prev, x.regime, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                sb.AppendLine($"{start:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}  →  {x.t:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}   {prev}  →  {x.regime}");
                prev = x.regime;
                start = x.t;
            }
        }

        WriteReportFile("A84_02_REGIME_TRANSITIONS", sb.ToString());

        // ---- A84_02B stats ----
        var sb2 = new StringBuilder();
        sb2.AppendLine("A84_02B — REGIME STATS (PORTFOLIO)");
        sb2.AppendLine("==================================");
        sb2.AppendLine();
        sb2.AppendLine($"Window          : {window} points");
        sb2.AppendLine($"Points analyzed : {labels.Count}");
        sb2.AppendLine();

        foreach (var g in labels.GroupBy(x => x.regime).OrderByDescending(g => g.Count()))
        {
            var pct = (decimal)g.Count() / labels.Count;
            sb2.AppendLine($"{g.Key,-14}  {g.Count(),6}  {pct,8:P2}");
        }

        sb2.AppendLine();
        var last = labels.Last();
        sb2.AppendLine($"Current Regime  : {last.regime}");
        sb2.AppendLine($"Slope (norm)    : {last.slope:F6}");
        sb2.AppendLine($"Vol  (norm)     : {last.vol:F6}");

        WriteReportFile("A84_02B_REGIME_STATS", sb2.ToString());
    }

    private static decimal EstimateSlopePerStep(List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> slice)
    {
        if (slice.Count < 2) return 0m;

        var first = slice.First().v;
        var last = slice.Last().v;

        if (first == 0) return 0m;

        var n = slice.Count;
        var ret = (last - first) / first;  // total window return
        return ret / n;                    // per-step normalized slope
    }

    private static decimal EstimateVolOfStepReturns(List<(DateTime t, decimal v)> slice)
    {
        if (slice.Count < 3) return 0m;

        var rets = new List<decimal>(slice.Count - 1);
        for (int i = 1; i < slice.Count; i++)
        {
            var prev = slice[i - 1].v;
            var cur = slice[i].v;
            if (prev == 0) continue;
            rets.Add((cur - prev) / prev);
        }

        if (rets.Count < 2) return 0m;

        var mean = rets.Average();
        var variance = rets.Sum(r => (r - mean) * (r - mean)) / (rets.Count - 1);
        return SqrtDecimal(variance);
    }

    private static string ClassifyPortfolioRegime(decimal slope, decimal vol)
    {
        // conservative thresholds
        if (vol > 0.0125m)
        {
            if (slope > 0.0005m) return "HIGHVOL_UP";
            if (slope < -0.0005m) return "HIGHVOL_DN";
            return "HIGHVOL";
        }

        if (slope > 0.0006m) return "TREND_UP";
        if (slope < -0.0006m) return "TREND_DN";
        return "RANGE";
    }

    private static decimal SqrtDecimal(decimal x)
    {
        if (x <= 0) return 0m;

        decimal g = (decimal)Math.Sqrt((double)x);
        for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
            g = (g + x / g) / 2m;

        return g;
    }

    private static void WriteReportText(string name, string title, string body)
    {
        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine(title);
        sb.AppendLine(new string('=', Math.Max(10, title.Length)));
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine(body);

        WriteReportFile(name, sb.ToString());
    }

    private static void WriteReportFile(string name, string content)
    {
        File.WriteAllText(
            Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"{name}_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"),
            content);
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀8␀4␀S␀t␀r␀a␀t␀e␀g␀y␀F␀i␀t␀n␀e␀s␀s␀G␀a␀t␀i␀n␀g␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀9␀.␀1␀1␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀2␀0␀9␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;
using TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

public sealed class A84StrategyFitnessGatingReportService
{
    public sealed class FitnessConfig
    {
        public int MinTrades { get; init; } = 30;              // institutional minimum sample
        public decimal MinPnL { get; init; } = 0m;             // must be > 0 to be eligible
        public int MaxStrategiesAllowed { get; init; } = 50;   // safety
        public int TopKMarkets { get; init; } = 20;            // CIO topK
        public decimal MaxWeightPerMarket { get; init; } = 0.10m;
        public decimal MaxWeightPerSymbol { get; init; } = 0.25m; // matches your CIO engine default idea
    }

    public sealed class FitnessRow
    {
        public int StrategyId { get; init; }
        public string StrategyCode { get; init; } = "";
        public decimal PnL { get; init; }
        public int Trades { get; init; }
        public int Exits { get; init; }
        public decimal FitnessScore { get; init; }
        public bool Allowed { get; init; }
        public string GateReason { get; init; } = "";
    }

    public (Dictionary<int, FitnessRow> fitness, HashSet<int> allowedIds) ComputeFitness(
        PortfolioBacktestResult result,
        FitnessConfig cfg)
    {
        var fitness = new Dictionary<int, FitnessRow>();
        var allowed = new HashSet<int>();

        foreach (var kv in result.StrategyPnL.OrderBy(k => k.Key))
        {
            var sid = kv.Key;
            var pnl = kv.Value;

            result.StrategyDiagnostics.TryGetValue(sid, out var diag);
            var trades = diag?.ExecutedEntries ?? 0;
            var exits = diag?.ExecutedExits ?? 0;

            // Fitness: smooth + sample-size aware
            // - require positive pnl
            // - require min trades
            // score ~ log(1+return%) * sqrt(trades)
            var startEquity = 100_000m; // PortfolioBacktestRunner uses 100k capital
            var retPct = startEquity <= 0 ? 0 : (pnl / startEquity) * 100m;

            decimal scoreCore = 0m;
            if (retPct > 0m && trades > 0)
            {
                var logTerm = (decimal)Math.Log(1.0 + (double)(retPct / 100m));
                var sqrtTrades = (decimal)Math.Sqrt(trades);
                scoreCore = logTerm * sqrtTrades;
            }

            bool allowedFlag = true;
            string reason = "OK";

            if (trades < cfg.MinTrades)
            {
                allowedFlag = false;
                reason = $"GATED: trades<{cfg.MinTrades}";
            }
            else if (pnl <= cfg.MinPnL)
            {
                allowedFlag = false;
                reason = $"GATED: pnl<= {cfg.MinPnL:0.##}";
            }
            else if (scoreCore <= 0m)
            {
                allowedFlag = false;
                reason = "GATED: fitness<=0";
            }

            var row = new FitnessRow
            {
                StrategyId = sid,
                StrategyCode = $"S{sid:00}",
                PnL = pnl,
                Trades = trades,
                Exits = exits,
                FitnessScore = scoreCore,
                Allowed = allowedFlag,
                GateReason = reason
            };

            fitness[sid] = row;

            if (allowedFlag)
                allowed.Add(sid);
        }

        // Safety clamp
        if (allowed.Count > cfg.MaxStrategiesAllowed)
        {
            allowed = allowed
                .OrderByDescending(id => fitness[id].FitnessScore)
                .Take(cfg.MaxStrategiesAllowed)
                .ToHashSet();
        }

        // update Allowed flags if clamped
        foreach (var id in fitness.Keys.ToList())
        {
            var r = fitness[id];
            if (!allowed.Contains(id) && r.Allowed)
            {
                fitness[id] = new FitnessRow
                {
                    StrategyId = r.StrategyId,
                    StrategyCode = r.StrategyCode,
                    PnL = r.PnL,
                    Trades = r.Trades,
                    Exits = r.Exits,
                    FitnessScore = r.FitnessScore,
                    Allowed = false,
                    GateReason = "GATED: max strategies clamp"
                };
            }
        }

        return (fitness, allowed);
    }

    public Dictionary<string, decimal> RecomputeCioWeightsWithGating(
        PortfolioBacktestResult result,
        HashSet<int> allowedStrategyIds,
        FitnessConfig cfg)
    {
        // Build MarketKey scoreByMarket using ONLY allowed strategies
        var scoreByMarket = new Dictionary<MarketKey, decimal>();

        foreach (var kv in result.StrategySymbolTimeframePnL)
        {
            // Key format: "S02::ATOMUSDT::1h"
            if (!TryParseStrategySymbolTfKey(kv.Key, out var sid, out var symbol, out var tf))
                continue;

            if (!allowedStrategyIds.Contains(sid))
                continue;

            var mk = new MarketKey(symbol, tf);
            if (!scoreByMarket.ContainsKey(mk))
                scoreByMarket[mk] = 0m;

            scoreByMarket[mk] += kv.Value; // PnL accumulation
        }

        var cio = new CioDynamicReallocationEngine(
            topK: cfg.TopKMarkets,
            minWeight: 0.00m,
            maxWeight: cfg.MaxWeightPerMarket,
            maxWeightPerSymbol: cfg.MaxWeightPerSymbol);

        var weights = cio.ComputeWeights(scoreByMarket);

        // Convert to existing report key format: "CIO::ATOMUSDT::1h"
        return weights.ToDictionary(
            x => $"CIO::{x.Key.Symbol}::{x.Key.Timeframe}",
            x => x.Value);
    }

    public void GenerateAndWrite(
        PortfolioBacktestResult result,
        DateTime runUtc,
        FitnessConfig? cfg = null)
    {
        cfg ??= new FitnessConfig();

        var (fitness, allowed) = ComputeFitness(result, cfg);
        var newCioWeights = RecomputeCioWeightsWithGating(result, allowed, cfg);

        // Write report
        var ts = runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss");
        var outFile = Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS_20260304_{ts}.txt".Replace("20260304", runUtc.ToString("yyyyMMdd")));

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine("A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS + CIO GATING");
        sb.AppendLine("====================================");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine($"Run Timestamp (UTC) : {runUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("FITNESS CONFIG");
        sb.AppendLine("--------------");
        sb.AppendLine($"MinTrades          : {cfg.MinTrades}");
        sb.AppendLine($"MinPnL             : {cfg.MinPnL:0.##}");
        sb.AppendLine($"TopKMarkets        : {cfg.TopKMarkets}");
        sb.AppendLine($"MaxWeightPerMarket : {cfg.MaxWeightPerMarket:P2}");
        sb.AppendLine($"MaxWeightPerSymbol : {cfg.MaxWeightPerSymbol:P2}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("STRATEGY FITNESS TABLE");
        sb.AppendLine("----------------------");
        sb.AppendLine("Code | PnL         | Trades | Exits | Fitness   | Allowed | GateReason");
        sb.AppendLine("-----+-------------+--------+-------+-----------+---------+---------------------------");

        foreach (var row in fitness.Values.OrderByDescending(r => r.FitnessScore))
        {
            sb.AppendLine(
                $"{row.StrategyCode,-4} | {row.PnL,11:0.00} | {row.Trades,6} | {row.Exits,5} | {row.FitnessScore,9:0.0000} | {(row.Allowed ? "YES" : "NO "),-7} | {row.GateReason}");
        }

        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine($"Allowed strategies : {allowed.Count} / {fitness.Count}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Allowed list       : {string.Join(", ", allowed.OrderBy(x => x).Select(x => $"S{x:00}"))}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("CIO WEIGHTS (POST-GATING) TOP 20");
        sb.AppendLine("-------------------------------");
        foreach (var w in newCioWeights
                     .OrderByDescending(x => x.Value)
                     .Take(20))
        {
            sb.AppendLine($"{w.Key,-22} W {w.Value:P2}");
        }

        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);
        File.WriteAllText(outFile, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8);
    }

    private static bool TryParseStrategySymbolTfKey(string key, out int strategyId, out string symbol, out string timeframe)
    {
        strategyId = 0;
        symbol = "";
        timeframe = "";

        // Expected: S02::ATOMUSDT::1h
        var parts = key.Split(new[] { "::" }, StringSplitOptions.None);
        if (parts.Length != 3) return false;

        var s = parts[0].Trim();
        if (!s.StartsWith("S", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) return false;
        if (!int.TryParse(s.Substring(1), out strategyId)) return false;

        symbol = parts[1].Trim();
        timeframe = parts[2].Trim();
        return !(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(symbol) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(timeframe));
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀8␀4␀S␀t␀r␀a␀t␀e␀g␀y␀F␀i␀t␀n␀e␀s␀s␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀6␀.␀9␀7␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀1␀6␀5␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

/// <summary>
/// A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS (Institutional heuristic)
/// Uses ONLY existing PortfolioBacktestResult fields:
/// - StrategyPnL (Dictionary<int, decimal>)
/// - StrategyDiagnostics (Dictionary<int, TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot>)
///
/// No dependency on non-existent fields like StrategyTrades.
/// </summary>
public sealed class A84StrategyFitnessReportService
{
    public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult result)
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        if (result is null)
        {
            WriteReportText(
                "A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS",
                "A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS",
                "NO DATA: PortfolioBacktestResult is null.");
            return;
        }

        var pnlByStrategy = result.StrategyPnL ?? new Dictionary<int, decimal>();
        var diagByStrategy = result.StrategyDiagnostics ?? new Dictionary<int, TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot>();

        if (pnlByStrategy.Count == 0 && diagByStrategy.Count == 0)
        {
            WriteReportText(
                "A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS",
                "A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS",
                "NO DATA: StrategyPnL and StrategyDiagnostics are empty.");
            return;
        }

        // Normalize PnL magnitude so it doesn't dominate everything.
        var maxAbsPnL = pnlByStrategy.Count == 0
            ? 1m
            : pnlByStrategy.Values.Select(v => Math.Abs(v)).DefaultIfEmpty(1m).Max();

        if (maxAbsPnL <= 0) maxAbsPnL = 1m;

        // Union of strategy IDs from both dicts
        var ids = pnlByStrategy.Keys
            .Concat(diagByStrategy.Keys)
            .Distinct()
            .OrderBy(x => x)
            .ToList();

        var rows = new List<Row>(ids.Count);

        foreach (var id in ids)
        {
            pnlByStrategy.TryGetValue(id, out var pnl);
            diagByStrategy.TryGetValue(id, out var d);

            var ticks = d?.TicksProcessed ?? 0;

            var entryAttempts = d?.EntryAttempts ?? 0;
            var executedEntries = d?.ExecutedEntries ?? 0;
            var executedExits = d?.ExecutedExits ?? 0;

            var signalLong = d?.SignalLong ?? 0;
            var signalExit = d?.SignalExit ?? 0;

            // Trades proxy: executed entries
            var trades = executedEntries;

            // Execution quality proxies
            decimal execRate = SafeDiv(executedEntries, entryAttempts);                 // 0..1
            decimal completionRate = SafeDiv(executedExits, Math.Max(1, executedEntries)); // 0..1
            decimal churnPenalty = entryAttempts <= 0 ? 0m : SafeDiv(entryAttempts - executedEntries, entryAttempts); // 0..1
            decimal discipline = SafeDiv(signalExit, Math.Max(1, signalLong));          // 0..1-ish

            // PnL scoring
            decimal pnlScore = Clamp01(Math.Abs(pnl) / maxAbsPnL);
            decimal directionScore = pnl >= 0 ? 1.0m : 0.0m;
            decimal activityScore = Clamp01(trades / 5000m); // tune later

            // Institutional fitness (bounded, deterministic)
            decimal fitness =
                (pnlScore * 0.45m) +
                (directionScore * 0.15m) +
                (activityScore * 0.20m) +
                (execRate * 0.10m) +
                (completionRate * 0.10m) -
                (churnPenalty * 0.10m);

            // Hard kill-switch: dead strategy => zero fitness
            if (trades <= 0)
                fitness = 0m;

            rows.Add(new Row(
                Id: id,
                PnL: pnl,
                Ticks: ticks,
                Trades: trades,
                EntryAttempts: entryAttempts,
                ExecutedEntries: executedEntries,
                ExecutedExits: executedExits,
                ExecRate: execRate,
                CompletionRate: completionRate,
                Discipline: discipline,
                ChurnPenalty: churnPenalty,
                Fitness: fitness
            ));
        }

        var ranked = rows
            .OrderByDescending(r => r.Fitness)
            .ThenByDescending(r => r.PnL)
            .ToList();

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine("A84_05 — STRATEGY FITNESS");
        sb.AppendLine("=========================");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine("Fitness is a bounded institutional score (0..1) using StrategyPnL + StrategyDiagnostics.");
        sb.AppendLine("Dead strategies (0 trades) are forced to Fitness 0.");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine($"MaxAbsPnL normalization : {maxAbsPnL:F2}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("Rank | Strat | Fitness | PnL           | Trades | ExecRate | ExitCov | Churn  | Discipline");
        sb.AppendLine("-----+-------+---------+---------------+--------+----------+---------+--------+-----------");

        int rank = 1;
        foreach (var r in ranked)
        {
            var strat = $"S{r.Id:00}";
            sb.AppendLine(
                $"{rank,4} | {strat,-5} | {r.Fitness,7:F3} | {r.PnL,13:F2} | {r.Trades,6} | {r.ExecRate,8:P2} | {r.CompletionRate,7:P2} | {r.ChurnPenalty,6:P2} | {r.Discipline,9:P2}");
            rank++;
        }

        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine("CIO Action Hint:");
        sb.AppendLine("- Only allocate capital to strategies with Fitness >= 0.25 and Trades > 0.");
        sb.AppendLine("- If Fitness=0, the strategy is inactive (signals not firing or execution path blocked).");

        WriteReportFile("A84_05_STRATEGY_FITNESS", sb.ToString());
    }

    private static decimal SafeDiv(int a, int b) => b <= 0 ? 0m : (decimal)a / b;

    private static decimal Clamp01(decimal x)
    {
        if (x < 0m) return 0m;
        if (x > 1m) return 1m;
        return x;
    }

    private static void WriteReportText(string name, string title, string body)
    {
        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine(title);
        sb.AppendLine(new string('=', Math.Max(10, title.Length)));
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine(body);

        WriteReportFile(name, sb.ToString());
    }

    private static void WriteReportFile(string name, string content)
    {
        var ts = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss");
        File.WriteAllText(
            Path.Combine(DataPaths.Reports, $"{name}_{ts}.txt"),
            content,
            Encoding.UTF8);
    }

    private sealed record Row(
        int Id,
        decimal PnL,
        long Ticks,
        int Trades,
        int EntryAttempts,
        int ExecutedEntries,
        int ExecutedExits,
        decimal ExecRate,
        decimal CompletionRate,
        decimal Discipline,
        decimal ChurnPenalty,
        decimal Fitness);
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀8␀4␀_␀R␀e␀g␀i␀m␀e␀R␀e␀s␀e␀a␀r␀c␀h␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀3␀.␀5␀8␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀9␀7␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;
using TQGA.Application.Portfolio;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

public sealed class A84_RegimeResearchService
{
    public void Generate(
        Dictionary<string, decimal> symbolTfPnL,
        Dictionary<string, decimal> cioWeights)
    {
        GenerateMarketRegime(symbolTfPnL);
        GenerateMarketRanking(symbolTfPnL);
        GenerateCioSkill(cioWeights);
        GenerateGrowthProjection(symbolTfPnL);
    }

    private void GenerateMarketRegime(Dictionary<string, decimal> pnl)
    {
        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("A84_01 — MARKET REGIME MAP");
        sb.AppendLine("===========================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        foreach (var kv in pnl.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(30))
        {
            var regime = DetectRegime(kv.Value);

            sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-20} {kv.Value,12:F2}   {regime}");
        }

        Write("A84_01_MARKET_REGIME", sb);
    }

    private void GenerateMarketRanking(Dictionary<string, decimal> pnl)
    {
        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("A84_02 — MARKET EDGE RANKING");
        sb.AppendLine("============================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        int rank = 1;

        foreach (var kv in pnl.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value))
        {
            sb.AppendLine($"{rank,3} | {kv.Key,-20} | {kv.Value,12:F2}");
            rank++;
        }

        Write("A84_02_MARKET_RANKING", sb);
    }

    private void GenerateCioSkill(Dictionary<string, decimal> weights)
    {
        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("A84_03 — CIO ALLOCATION SKILL");
        sb.AppendLine("==============================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        var concentration = weights.Values.Max();
        var diversification = weights.Count;

        sb.AppendLine($"Markets Allocated : {diversification}");
        sb.AppendLine($"Max Weight        : {concentration:P2}");

        string rating =
            concentration < 0.10m ? "Institutional"
          : concentration < 0.20m ? "Professional"
          : "Concentrated";

        sb.AppendLine($"CIO Rating        : {rating}");

        Write("A84_03_CIO_RATING", sb);
    }

    private void GenerateGrowthProjection(Dictionary<string, decimal> pnl)
    {
        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("A84_04 — SYSTEM GROWTH PROJECTION");
        sb.AppendLine("=================================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        var totalEdge = pnl.Values.Sum();

        decimal monthlyROI =
            totalEdge > 200000 ? 0.07m :
            totalEdge > 100000 ? 0.05m :
            0.03m;

        sb.AppendLine($"Estimated Monthly ROI : {monthlyROI:P2}");

        decimal capital = 10000;

        for (int y = 1; y <= 10; y++)
        {
            capital *= (1 + monthlyROI * 12);

            sb.AppendLine(
                $"Year {y,2} → {capital,12:F0} USD");
        }

        Write("A84_04_GROWTH_PROJECTION", sb);
    }

    private string DetectRegime(decimal pnl)
    {
        if (pnl > 40000) return "STRONG TREND";
        if (pnl > 10000) return "TREND";
        if (pnl > 0) return "WEAK TREND";
        if (pnl > -5000) return "RANGE";

        return "HOSTILE";
    }

    private void Write(string name, StringBuilder sb)
    {
        File.WriteAllText(
            Path.Combine(
                DataPaths.Reports,
                $"{name}_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"),
            sb.ToString());
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀A␀l␀p␀h␀a␀R␀a␀n␀k␀i␀n␀g␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀4␀.␀0␀3␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀9␀1␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

public sealed class AlphaRankingReportService
{
    // Institutional fix:
    // - Do NOT resolve a DI-scoped TradeDecisionDiagnostics here.
    // - Always read diagnostics snapshots from PortfolioBacktestResult (per-strategy).
    public void Generate(PortfolioBacktestResult? result)
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("REPORT 05 — ALPHA DIAGNOSTICS (PER STRATEGY)");
        sb.AppendLine("===========================================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        if (result == null)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: result is null.");
            Write(sb);
            return;
        }

        var strategyPnL = result.StrategyPnL ?? new Dictionary<int, decimal>();
        var strategyDiagnostics = result.StrategyDiagnostics ?? new Dictionary<int, TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot>();

        bool hasPnL = strategyPnL.Count > 0;
        bool hasDiag = strategyDiagnostics.Count > 0;

        if (!hasPnL && !hasDiag)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("NO DATA: StrategyPnL and StrategyDiagnostics are empty.");
            sb.AppendLine("NOTE: Ensure PortfolioBacktestRunner populates StrategyDiagnostics snapshots per strategy.");
            Write(sb);
            return;
        }

        var ids = new HashSet<int>();

        if (hasPnL)
        {
            foreach (int id in strategyPnL.Keys)
                ids.Add(id);
        }

        if (hasDiag)
        {
            foreach (int id in strategyDiagnostics.Keys)
                ids.Add(id);
        }

        sb.AppendLine("ID  | PnL        | Ticks     | Long    | Short   | Exit    | EntryAtt | EntryOK  | ExitOK");
        sb.AppendLine("----+------------+-----------+---------+---------+---------+----------+----------+--------");

        foreach (int id in ids.OrderBy(i => i))
        {
            strategyPnL.TryGetValue(id, out decimal pnl);

            TradeDecisionDiagnosticsSnapshot? snapshot = null;
            bool hasSnapshot = false;

            if (hasDiag)
                hasSnapshot = strategyDiagnostics.TryGetValue(id, out snapshot);

            int ticksProcessed = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.TicksProcessed : 0;
            int signalLong = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.SignalLong : 0;
            int signalShort = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.SignalShort : 0;
            int signalExit = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.SignalExit : 0;
            int entryAttempts = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.EntryAttempts : 0;
            int executedEntries = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.ExecutedEntries : 0;
            int executedExits = hasSnapshot && snapshot != null ? snapshot.ExecutedExits : 0;

            sb.AppendLine(string.Format(
                "{0,2:00}  | {1,10:F2} | {2,9} | {3,7} | {4,7} | {5,7} | {6,8} | {7,8} | {8,6}",
                id,
                pnl,
                ticksProcessed,
                signalLong,
                signalShort,
                signalExit,
                entryAttempts,
                executedEntries,
                executedExits));
        }

        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine("NOTES");
        sb.AppendLine("-----");
        sb.AppendLine("- This report is generated from PortfolioBacktestResult snapshots (institutional-safe).");
        sb.AppendLine("- If counts are zero, verify TradingEngine increments diagnostics and Runner stores snapshots.");

        Write(sb);
    }

    private static void Write(StringBuilder sb)
    {
        string path = Path.Combine(
            DataPaths.Reports,
            $"REPORT_05_ALPHA_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt");

        File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString());
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀C␀i␀o␀C␀a␀p␀i␀t␀a␀l␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀2␀.␀9␀1␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀6␀0␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

public sealed class CioCapitalReportService
{
    public void Generate(Dictionary<int, decimal> weights)
    {
        Generate(
            strategyWeights: weights,
            marketAllocationWeights: null,
            cashWeight: 0m);
    }

    public void Generate(
        Dictionary<int, decimal> strategyWeights,
        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal>? marketAllocationWeights,
        decimal cashWeight)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(strategyWeights);

        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("REPORT 06 — CAPITAL ALLOCATION");
        sb.AppendLine("================================");
        sb.AppendLine();

        sb.AppendLine("SECTION A — STRATEGY TRUST WEIGHTS");
        sb.AppendLine("----------------------------------");

        foreach (var w in strategyWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value))
            sb.AppendLine($"Strategy {w.Key:00} -> {(w.Value * 100m):F2}%");

        sb.AppendLine();

        if (marketAllocationWeights is not null && marketAllocationWeights.Count > 0)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("SECTION B — REALISTIC MARKET CAPITAL ALLOCATION");
            sb.AppendLine("-----------------------------------------------");

            foreach (var kv in marketAllocationWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value))
                sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key} -> {(kv.Value * 100m):F2}%");

            sb.AppendLine($"CASH -> {(cashWeight * 100m):F2}%");
            sb.AppendLine();

            sb.AppendLine("SECTION C — ALLOCATION QUALITY METRICS");
            sb.AppendLine("--------------------------------------");

            int marketCount = marketAllocationWeights.Count;
            decimal maxWeight = marketAllocationWeights.Values.DefaultIfEmpty(0m).Max();
            decimal minWeight = marketAllocationWeights.Values.DefaultIfEmpty(0m).Min();
            decimal totalAllocated = marketAllocationWeights.Values.Sum();

            sb.AppendLine($"Markets Allocated: {marketCount}");
            sb.AppendLine($"Total Market Allocation: {(totalAllocated * 100m):F2}%");
            sb.AppendLine($"Cash Allocation: {(cashWeight * 100m):F2}%");
            sb.AppendLine($"Max Market Weight: {(maxWeight * 100m):F2}%");
            sb.AppendLine($"Min Market Weight: {(minWeight * 100m):F2}%");

            if (maxWeight > 0.25m)
                sb.AppendLine("WARNING: High concentration");

            if (marketCount < 5)
                sb.AppendLine("WARNING: Low diversification");

            if (cashWeight > 0.25m)
                sb.AppendLine("WARNING: High idle cash");
        }

        File.WriteAllText(
            Path.Combine(
                DataPaths.Reports,
                $"REPORT_06_CAPITAL_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt"),
            sb.ToString());
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀A␀p␀p␀l␀i␀c␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀\␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀s␀\␀C␀i␀o␀W␀e␀i␀g␀h␀t␀s␀S␀y␀m␀b␀o␀l␀T␀i␀m␀e␀f␀r␀a␀m␀e␀R␀e␀p␀o␀r␀t␀S␀e␀r␀v␀i␀c␀e␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀1␀.␀5␀7␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀3␀6␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using System.Text;
using TQGA.Application.Paths;

namespace TQGA.Application.Services;

public sealed class CioWeightsSymbolTimeframeReportService
{
    public void Generate(Dictionary<string, decimal> cioSymbolTimeframeWeights)
    {
        Directory.CreateDirectory(DataPaths.Reports);

        var sb = new StringBuilder();

        sb.AppendLine("REPORT 12 — CIO WEIGHTS (SYMBOL × TIMEFRAME)");
        sb.AppendLine("===========================================");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine("Key format: CIO::SYMBOL::TF  (example: CIO::ATOMUSDT::1h)");
        sb.AppendLine();

        if (cioSymbolTimeframeWeights == null || cioSymbolTimeframeWeights.Count == 0)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("NO DATA");
        }
        else
        {
            sb.AppendLine("TOP 50 (by weight)");
            sb.AppendLine("------------------");
            foreach (var kv in cioSymbolTimeframeWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value).Take(50))
                sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-28} {kv.Value,10:F6}");

            sb.AppendLine();
            sb.AppendLine("FULL LIST (sorted by weight desc)");
            sb.AppendLine("---------------------------------");
            foreach (var kv in cioSymbolTimeframeWeights.OrderByDescending(x => x.Value))
                sb.AppendLine($"{kv.Key,-28} {kv.Value,10:F6}");
        }

        var path = Path.Combine(
            DataPaths.Reports,
            $"REPORT_12_CIO_WEIGHTS_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.txt");

        File.WriteAllText(path, sb.ToString());
    }
}
