␀using TQGA.Application.Interfaces;

namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Time;

public sealed class SystemClock : IClock
{
    public DateTime UtcNow => DateTime.UtcNow;

    public void Advance(TimeSpan delta)
    {
        // real clock does not move
    }
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀I␀n␀f␀r␀a␀s␀t␀r␀u␀c␀t␀u␀r␀e␀\␀T␀r␀a␀d␀i␀n␀g␀\␀B␀a␀c␀k␀t␀e␀s␀t␀O␀r␀d␀e␀r␀E␀x␀e␀c␀u␀t␀o␀r␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀0␀.␀7␀7␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀2␀7␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Application.Trading;
using TQGA.Domain.Trading;

namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Trading;

public sealed class BacktestOrderExecutor : IOrderExecutor
{
    private decimal _lastPrice;
    private decimal _lastFillPrice;

    public void UpdateMarketPrice(decimal price)
    {
        _lastPrice = price;
    }

    public Task PlaceMarketOrderAsync(
        string symbol,
        TradeSide side,
        decimal quantity,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        _lastFillPrice = _lastPrice;
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    public Task ClosePositionAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        _lastFillPrice = _lastPrice;
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    public decimal GetFillPrice() => _lastFillPrice;
}

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀I␀n␀f␀r␀a␀s␀t␀r␀u␀c␀t␀u␀r␀e␀\␀T␀r␀a␀d␀i␀n␀g␀\␀I␀n␀M␀e␀m␀o␀r␀y␀P␀o␀s␀i␀t␀i␀o␀n␀R␀e␀p␀o␀s␀i␀t␀o␀r␀y␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀0␀.␀8␀6␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀3␀0␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using TQGA.Application.Trading;
using TQGA.Domain.Trading;

namespace TQGA.Infrastructure.Trading;

public sealed class InMemoryPositionRepository : IPositionRepository
{
    private Position? _position;

    public bool HasOpenPosition()
        => _position != null;

    public decimal CurrentSize()
        => _position?.Quantity ?? 0m;

    public void Open(TradeSide side, decimal quantity, decimal price)
    {
        if (_position != null)
            return;

        var signedQty = side == TradeSide.Buy
            ? quantity
            : -quantity;

        _position = new Position(
            symbol: "DEFAULT",
            quantity: signedQty,
            entryPrice: price
        );
    }

    public void Close(decimal price)
    {
        if (_position == null)
            return;

        _position = null;
    }
}

␀global using System;
global using System.Windows.Forms;

␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀F␀I␀L␀E␀:␀ ␀D␀:␀\␀D␀ ␀D␀A␀T␀A␀ ␀B␀A␀C␀K␀U␀P␀\␀A␀R␀I␀F␀5␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀\␀T␀Q␀G␀A␀.␀W␀i␀n␀F␀o␀r␀m␀s␀\␀M␀a␀i␀n␀F␀o␀r␀m␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀T␀Y␀P␀E␀:␀ ␀.␀c␀s␀␀
␀S␀I␀Z␀E␀:␀ ␀2␀0␀.␀3␀2␀ ␀K␀B␀␀
␀L␀I␀N␀E␀S␀:␀ ␀4␀4␀1␀␀
␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀=␀␀
␀using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using TQGA.Application.Portfolio;
using TQGA.Application.Services;
using TQGA.Infrastructure.MarketData;
using AppBinanceUniverse = TQGA.Application.Portfolio.BinanceUniverse;

namespace TQGA.WinForms;

public sealed class MainForm : Form
{
    private readonly IServiceProvider _sp;
    private readonly HistoricalDataBootstrapper _bootstrapper;
    private readonly StructureReportService _structure;
    private readonly FullReportService _fullReport;
    private readonly ReportPortalPublishService _portalPublish;
    private readonly GoogleDriveReportPublishService _googleDrivePublish;
    private readonly GoogleDriveCombinedPublishService _googleDriveCombinedPublish;
    private readonly GoogleDriveCombinedStablePublishService _googleDriveCombinedStablePublish;

    private Button? _btnDownload;
    private Button? _btnUpdate;
    private Button? _btnRunResearch;
    private Button? _btnFullReportSave;
    private Button? _btnFullReportClipboard;
    private Button? _btnPublished;
    private Button? _btnGooglePublish;
    private Button? _btnGooglePublish2;
    private Button? _btnGooglePublish3;

    private Label? _lblStrategies;
    private CheckedListBox? _strategyList;
    private Button? _btnSelectAll;
    private Button? _btnSelectNone;

    private Label? _lblTimeframes;
    private CheckedListBox? _timeframeList;
    private Button? _btnTfAll;
    private Button? _btnTfNone;

    private Label? _lblCoinCategories;
    private CheckedListBox? _coinCategoryList;
    private Button? _btnCatAll;
    private Button? _btnCatNone;

    private Label? _lblCoinNames;
    private CheckedListBox? _coinNameList;
    private Button? _btnCoinAll;
    private Button? _btnCoinNone;

    private static readonly Dictionary<string, IReadOnlyList<string>> CoinCategories =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        {
            ["Majors"] =
            [
                "BTCUSDT","ETHUSDT","BNBUSDT","SOLUSDT","XRPUSDT","ADAUSDT","DOGEUSDT",
                "TRXUSDT","AVAXUSDT","DOTUSDT","LINKUSDT","MATICUSDT","LTCUSDT","BCHUSDT"
            ],
            ["DeFi"] =
            [
                "AAVEUSDT","UNIUSDT","MKRUSDT","RUNEUSDT"
            ],
            ["AI / Compute"] =
            [
                "ICPUSDT","FETUSDT","RNDRUSDT","GRTUSDT"
            ],
            ["Narrative / New Cycle"] =
            [
                "ORDIUSDT","TIAUSDT","INJUSDT","SUIUSDT","SEIUSDT","JUPUSDT","WIFUSDT","ARBUSDT","OPUSDT"
            ],
            ["Alt Midcaps / Others"] =
            [
                "ATOMUSDT","APTUSDT","NEARUSDT","FILUSDT","ETCUSDT","PEPEUSDT","SHIBUSDT","ALGOUSDT","VETUSDT"
            ]
        };

    public MainForm(
        IServiceProvider sp,
        HistoricalDataBootstrapper bootstrapper,
        StructureReportService structure,
        FullReportService fullReport)
    {
        _sp = sp;
        _bootstrapper = bootstrapper;
        _structure = structure;
        _fullReport = fullReport;
        _portalPublish = new ReportPortalPublishService();
        _googleDrivePublish = new GoogleDriveReportPublishService();
        _googleDriveCombinedPublish = new GoogleDriveCombinedPublishService();
        _googleDriveCombinedStablePublish = new GoogleDriveCombinedStablePublishService();

        Text = "TQGA";
        Width = 1550;
        Height = 940;
        StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterScreen;

        BuildUi();
    }

    private void BuildUi()
    {
        _btnDownload = new Button { Text = "DOWNLOAD CANDLES DATA", Width = 220, Top = 30, Left = 30 };
        _btnUpdate = new Button { Text = "UPDATE CANDLES DATA", Width = 220, Top = 80, Left = 30 };
        _btnRunResearch = new Button { Text = "RUN PORTOFOLIO", Width = 220, Top = 130, Left = 30 };
        _btnFullReportSave = new Button { Text = "FULL REPORT → FILE", Width = 220, Top = 200, Left = 30 };
        _btnFullReportClipboard = new Button { Text = "FULL REPORT → CLIPBOARD", Width = 220, Top = 250, Left = 30 };
        _btnPublished = new Button { Text = "PUBLISHED", Width = 220, Top = 300, Left = 30 };
        _btnGooglePublish = new Button { Text = "GOOGLE PUBLISH", Width = 220, Top = 350, Left = 30 };
        _btnGooglePublish2 = new Button { Text = "GOOGLE PUBLISHED 2", Width = 220, Top = 400, Left = 30 };
        _btnGooglePublish3 = new Button { Text = "GOOGLE PUBLISHED 3", Width = 220, Top = 450, Left = 30 };

        _btnDownload.Click += async (_, _) => await RunSafe(_bootstrapper.ForceFullDownloadAsync);
        _btnUpdate.Click += async (_, _) => await RunSafe(_bootstrapper.UpdateAsync);
        _btnRunResearch.Click += async (_, _) => await RunResearch();
        _btnPublished.Click += async (_, _) => await PublishPortalAsync();
        _btnGooglePublish.Click += async (_, _) => await PublishGoogleDriveAsync();
        _btnGooglePublish2.Click += async (_, _) => await PublishGoogleDriveCombinedAsync();
        _btnGooglePublish3.Click += async (_, _) => await PublishGoogleDriveCombinedStableAsync();

        _btnFullReportSave.Click += (_, _) =>
        {
            string path = _fullReport.SaveCombinedToFile();
            MessageBox.Show($"Saved:\n{path}");
        };

        _btnFullReportClipboard.Click += (_, _) =>
        {
            string text = _fullReport.BuildChatGptSizedReport();
            Clipboard.SetText(text);
            MessageBox.Show("Copied (ChatGPT sized).");
        };

        _lblStrategies = new Label { Text = "Select Strategies:", Left = 300, Top = 30, Width = 220 };
        _strategyList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 300, Top = 55, Width = 330, Height = 560, CheckOnClick = true };
        _btnSelectAll = new Button { Text = "Select All", Left = 300, Top = 625, Width = 120 };
        _btnSelectNone = new Button { Text = "Select None", Left = 430, Top = 625, Width = 120 };
        _btnSelectAll.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_strategyList, true);
        _btnSelectNone.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_strategyList, false);

        _lblTimeframes = new Label { Text = "Select Timeframes:", Left = 660, Top = 30, Width = 220 };
        _timeframeList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 660, Top = 55, Width = 180, Height = 140, CheckOnClick = true };
        _btnTfAll = new Button { Text = "TF All", Left = 660, Top = 205, Width = 85 };
        _btnTfNone = new Button { Text = "TF None", Left = 755, Top = 205, Width = 85 };
        _btnTfAll.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_timeframeList, true);
        _btnTfNone.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_timeframeList, false);

        _lblCoinCategories = new Label { Text = "Coin Categories:", Left = 880, Top = 30, Width = 220 };
        _coinCategoryList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 880, Top = 55, Width = 230, Height = 220, CheckOnClick = true };
        _btnCatAll = new Button { Text = "Cat All", Left = 880, Top = 285, Width = 100 };
        _btnCatNone = new Button { Text = "Cat None", Left = 990, Top = 285, Width = 100 };
        _btnCatAll.Click += (_, _) => { SetAllChecked(_coinCategoryList, true); RefreshCoinNames(); };
        _btnCatNone.Click += (_, _) => { SetAllChecked(_coinCategoryList, false); RefreshCoinNames(); };

        _lblCoinNames = new Label { Text = "Coin Names:", Left = 1140, Top = 30, Width = 220 };
        _coinNameList = new CheckedListBox { Left = 1140, Top = 55, Width = 230, Height = 560, CheckOnClick = true };
        _btnCoinAll = new Button { Text = "Coin All", Left = 1140, Top = 625, Width = 100 };
        _btnCoinNone = new Button { Text = "Coin None", Left = 1250, Top = 625, Width = 100 };
        _btnCoinAll.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_coinNameList, true);
        _btnCoinNone.Click += (_, _) => SetAllChecked(_coinNameList, false);

        _coinCategoryList.ItemCheck += (_, _) => BeginInvoke(new Action(RefreshCoinNames));

        Controls.AddRange(
        [
            _btnDownload, _btnUpdate, _btnRunResearch, _btnFullReportSave, _btnFullReportClipboard,
            _btnPublished, _btnGooglePublish, _btnGooglePublish2, _btnGooglePublish3,
            _lblStrategies, _strategyList, _btnSelectAll, _btnSelectNone,
            _lblTimeframes, _timeframeList, _btnTfAll, _btnTfNone,
            _lblCoinCategories, _coinCategoryList, _btnCatAll, _btnCatNone,
            _lblCoinNames, _coinNameList, _btnCoinAll, _btnCoinNone
        ]);
    }

    protected override void OnLoad(EventArgs e)
    {
        base.OnLoad(e);

        _structure.Generate();
        LoadStrategyList();
        LoadTimeframeList();
        LoadCoinCategories();
        RefreshCoinNames();

        MessageBox.Show("TQGA READY", "BOOT");
    }

    private void LoadStrategyList()
    {
        if (_strategyList == null) return;

        _strategyList.Items.Clear();

        using var scope = _sp.CreateScope();
        var orchestrator = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator>();

        foreach (Type t in orchestrator.GetRegisteredStrategies())
            _strategyList.Items.Add(new StrategyListItem(t), true);
    }

    private void LoadTimeframeList()
    {
        if (_timeframeList == null) return;

        _timeframeList.Items.Clear();
        foreach (string tf in AppBinanceUniverse.Timeframes)
            _timeframeList.Items.Add(tf, true);
    }

    private void LoadCoinCategories()
    {
        if (_coinCategoryList == null) return;

        _coinCategoryList.Items.Clear();
        foreach (string key in CoinCategories.Keys)
            _coinCategoryList.Items.Add(key, true);
    }

    private void RefreshCoinNames()
    {
        if (_coinNameList == null || _coinCategoryList == null) return;

        List<string> selectedCategories = _coinCategoryList.CheckedItems
            .OfType<string>()
            .ToList();

        List<string> selectedSymbols = selectedCategories.Count == 0
            ? AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols.ToList()
            : selectedCategories
                .Where(CoinCategories.ContainsKey)
                .SelectMany(x => CoinCategories[x])
                .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                .Where(x => AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols.Contains(x, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                .OrderBy(x => x)
                .ToList();

        _coinNameList.Items.Clear();
        foreach (string s in selectedSymbols)
            _coinNameList.Items.Add(s, true);
    }

    private static void SetAllChecked(CheckedListBox? list, bool isChecked)
    {
        if (list == null) return;

        for (int i = 0; i < list.Items.Count; i++)
            list.SetItemChecked(i, isChecked);
    }

    private async Task RunResearch()
    {
        using var scope = _sp.CreateScope();
        var orchestrator = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator>();

        IReadOnlyList<Type> selectedStrategies = GetSelectedStrategyTypes(orchestrator);
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedTimeframes = GetSelectedTimeframes();
        IReadOnlyList<string> selectedSymbols = GetSelectedSymbols();
        FrictionProfile friction = FrictionProfile.Default;

        await RunSafe(() => orchestrator.RunSelectedAsync(
            selectedStrategies,
            selectedSymbols,
            selectedTimeframes,
            friction,
            CancellationToken.None));
    }

    private async Task PublishPortalAsync()
    {
        Toggle(false);

        try
        {
            var result = await Task.Run(() => _portalPublish.PublishLatestReports());

            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Portal generated successfully.\n\n" +
                $"Reports: {result.ReportCount}\n" +
                $"Report Source: {result.ReportDirectory}\n" +
                $"Site: {result.SiteDirectory}\n" +
                $"Local Web URL: {result.LocalWebUrl}",
                "PUBLISHED",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Publish failed.\n\n{ex.Message}",
                "PUBLISHED ERROR",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            Toggle(true);
        }
    }

    private async Task PublishGoogleDriveAsync()
    {
        Toggle(false);

        try
        {
            var result = await _googleDrivePublish.PublishAsync();

            string clipboardText = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(result.FullLinksText)
                ? File.ReadAllText(result.LinksOutputPath)
                : result.FullLinksText;

            Clipboard.SetText(clipboardText);

            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Google Drive publish completed successfully.\n\n" +
                $"Published Files: {result.PublishedCount}\n" +
                $"Folder Link: {result.GoogleDriveFolderLink}\n" +
                $"Links File: {result.LinksOutputPath}\n\n" +
                $"The FULL links list has been copied to clipboard.",
                "GOOGLE PUBLISH",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Google Drive publish failed.\n\n{ex.Message}",
                "GOOGLE PUBLISH ERROR",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            Toggle(true);
        }
    }

    private async Task PublishGoogleDriveCombinedAsync()
    {
        Toggle(false);

        try
        {
            var result = await _googleDriveCombinedPublish.PublishCombinedAsync();

            string clipboardText =
                "TQGA GOOGLE PUBLISHED 2" + Environment.NewLine +
                "================================" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"Combined File: {result.CombinedFileName}" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"Folder Link: {result.GoogleDriveFolderLink}" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"View Link: {result.PublicViewLink}" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"Direct Link: {result.PublicDirectLink}";

            Clipboard.SetText(clipboardText);

            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Google combined publish completed successfully.\n\n" +
                $"Combined File: {result.CombinedFileName}\n" +
                $"Local Combined Path: {result.CombinedFilePath}\n" +
                $"Folder Link: {result.GoogleDriveFolderLink}\n" +
                $"View Link: {result.PublicViewLink}\n" +
                $"Direct Link: {result.PublicDirectLink}\n\n" +
                $"The combined publish result has been copied to clipboard.",
                "GOOGLE PUBLISHED 2",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Google combined publish failed.\n\n{ex.Message}",
                "GOOGLE PUBLISHED 2 ERROR",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            Toggle(true);
        }
    }

    private async Task PublishGoogleDriveCombinedStableAsync()
    {
        Toggle(false);

        try
        {
            var result = await _googleDriveCombinedStablePublish.PublishStableAsync();

            string clipboardText =
                "TQGA GOOGLE PUBLISHED 3" + Environment.NewLine +
                "================================" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"Combined File: {result.CombinedFileName}" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"Stable File Id: {result.StableFileId}" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"View Link: {result.PublicViewLink}" + Environment.NewLine +
                $"Direct Link: {result.PublicDirectLink}";

            Clipboard.SetText(clipboardText);

            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Google stable combined publish completed successfully.\n\n" +
                $"Combined File: {result.CombinedFileName}\n" +
                $"Local Combined Path: {result.CombinedFilePath}\n" +
                $"Stable File Id: {result.StableFileId}\n" +
                $"View Link: {result.PublicViewLink}\n" +
                $"Direct Link: {result.PublicDirectLink}\n\n" +
                $"The stable publish result has been copied to clipboard.",
                "GOOGLE PUBLISHED 3",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            MessageBox.Show(
                $"Google stable combined publish failed.\n\n{ex.Message}",
                "GOOGLE PUBLISHED 3 ERROR",
                MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                MessageBoxIcon.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            Toggle(true);
        }
    }

    private IReadOnlyList<Type> GetSelectedStrategyTypes(PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator orchestrator)
    {
        if (_strategyList == null || _strategyList.Items.Count == 0)
            return orchestrator.GetRegisteredStrategies();

        List<Type> checkedItems = _strategyList.CheckedItems
            .OfType<StrategyListItem>()
            .Select(x => x.Type)
            .ToList();

        return checkedItems.Count == 0
            ? orchestrator.GetRegisteredStrategies()
            : checkedItems;
    }

    private IReadOnlyList<string> GetSelectedTimeframes()
    {
        if (_timeframeList == null || _timeframeList.Items.Count == 0)
            return AppBinanceUniverse.Timeframes;

        List<string> checkedItems = _timeframeList.CheckedItems.OfType<string>().ToList();

        return checkedItems.Count == 0
            ? AppBinanceUniverse.Timeframes
            : checkedItems;
    }

    private IReadOnlyList<string> GetSelectedSymbols()
    {
        if (_coinNameList == null || _coinNameList.Items.Count == 0)
            return AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols;

        List<string> checkedItems = _coinNameList.CheckedItems.OfType<string>().ToList();

        return checkedItems.Count == 0
            ? AppBinanceUniverse.ActiveSymbols
            : checkedItems;
    }

    private async Task RunSafe(Func<Task> action)
    {
        Toggle(false);

        try
        {
            await Task.Run(action);
            MessageBox.Show("DONE");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message);
        }

        Toggle(true);
    }

    private void Toggle(bool enabled)
    {
        if (_btnDownload != null) _btnDownload.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnUpdate != null) _btnUpdate.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnRunResearch != null) _btnRunResearch.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnFullReportSave != null) _btnFullReportSave.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnFullReportClipboard != null) _btnFullReportClipboard.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnPublished != null) _btnPublished.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnGooglePublish != null) _btnGooglePublish.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnGooglePublish2 != null) _btnGooglePublish2.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnGooglePublish3 != null) _btnGooglePublish3.Enabled = enabled;

        if (_strategyList != null) _strategyList.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_timeframeList != null) _timeframeList.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_coinCategoryList != null) _coinCategoryList.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_coinNameList != null) _coinNameList.Enabled = enabled;

        if (_btnSelectAll != null) _btnSelectAll.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnSelectNone != null) _btnSelectNone.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnTfAll != null) _btnTfAll.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnTfNone != null) _btnTfNone.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnCatAll != null) _btnCatAll.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnCatNone != null) _btnCatNone.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnCoinAll != null) _btnCoinAll.Enabled = enabled;
        if (_btnCoinNone != null) _btnCoinNone.Enabled = enabled;
    }

    private sealed record StrategyListItem(Type Type)
    {
        public override string ToString() => Type.Name;
    }
}

␀using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using TQGA.Application.Accounting;
using TQGA.Application.Backtesting;
using TQGA.Application.Portfolio;
using TQGA.Application.Risk;
using TQGA.Application.Services;
using TQGA.Application.Strategy;
using TQGA.Application.Trading;
using TQGA.Infrastructure;
using TQGA.Infrastructure.Risk;
using TQGA.Infrastructure.Trading;

namespace TQGA.WinForms;

internal static class Program
{
    [STAThread]
    static void Main()
    {
        var host = Host.CreateDefaultBuilder()
            .ConfigureServices((context, services) =>
            {
                services.AddInfrastructure();

                services.AddScoped<TradeLedger>();
                services.AddScoped<EquityCurve>();

                services.AddScoped<ICapitalAllocator, StrategyCapitalAllocator>();

                services.AddScoped<IOrderExecutor, BacktestOrderExecutor>();
                services.AddScoped<IPositionRepository, InMemoryPositionRepository>();
                services.AddScoped<IRiskManager, SimpleRiskManager>();
                services.AddScoped<TradeDecisionDiagnostics>();

                services.AddScoped<StrategyFactory>();
                services.AddScoped<PortfolioBacktestRunner>();
                services.AddScoped<PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator>();

                services.AddSingleton<MiniReportSamplingService>();
                services.AddScoped<PortfolioEquityReportService>();
                services.AddScoped<PortfolioDrawdownReportService>();
                services.AddScoped<AlphaRankingReportService>();
                services.AddScoped<CioCapitalReportService>();
                services.AddScoped<StrategyContributionReportService>();
                services.AddScoped<SymbolHeatmapReportService>();
                services.AddScoped<StructureReportService>();
                services.AddScoped<FullReportService>();
                services.AddSingleton<A84_RegimeResearchService>();

                // NEW — local HTML portal publishing
                services.AddSingleton<ReportPortalPublishService>();

                services.AddScoped<MainForm>();
            })
            .Build();

        ApplicationConfiguration.Initialize();

        using var scope = host.Services.CreateScope();
        var mainForm = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<MainForm>();

        System.Windows.Forms.Application.Run(mainForm);
    }
}

␀TQGA â€” TRADING QUANT GLOBAL ARCHITECTURE
========================================

LAST UPDATED
------------
2026-03-07
Institutional evolution stage:
Pre-Trade Market Selection + Risk Budget Engine + True Rule-Based Walk-Forward + Liquidity/Friction Upgrade

SOLUTION STRUCTURE
------------------
TQGA.Domain
TQGA.Application
TQGA.Infrastructure
TQGA.WinForms

UI CONTRACT (UNCHANGED)
-----------------------
Existing controls remain:
- DOWNLOAD CANDLES DATA
- UPDATE CANDLES DATA
- RUN PORTOFOLIO
- FULL REPORT
- COPY CLIPBOAR REPORTS
- LIST BOX FOR SELECTING STRATEGIES WITH CHECK BOXES
- LIST BOX FOR SELECTING TIME FRAMES WITH CHECK BOXES
- LIST BOX FOR SELECTING COIN CATEGORIES WITH CHECK BOXES
- LIST BOX FOR SELECTING COIN NAMES WITH CHECK BOXES

CURRENT EXECUTION FLOW
----------------------
RUN PORTOFOLIO
  -> MainForm selection:
       strategies
       timeframes
       coin categories
       coin names
  -> PortfolioBacktestOrchestrator.RunSelectedAsync(...)
  -> PortfolioBacktestRunner.RunAsync(...)
  -> PreTradeMarketSelectionService
  -> PortfolioRiskBudgetEngine
  -> StrategyFactory + TradingEngine
  -> Strategy x selected Symbol x Timeframe markets
  -> friction-adjusted attribution
  -> REPORT_05 ... REPORT_13
  -> A84 research layer
  -> CIO allocation
  -> Fitness gating
  -> TRUE walk-forward reports

CURRENT DATA / EXECUTION NOTES
------------------------------
- ICandleDataFeed still exposes GetCandles(symbol, timeframe) only.
- Trade domain model already supports Quantity.
- BacktestOrderExecutor already accepts quantity in market order placement.
- Current TradingEngine still behaves as a single-open-trade engine per strategy instance.
- Therefore the safest institutional upgrade path is to apply risk budgeting at the portfolio/backtest layer first.

CURRENT RISK BUDGET ENGINE
--------------------------
PortfolioRiskBudgetEngine now decides how much to trust each selected market opportunity.

Current dimensions:
- ATR sizing
- regime multiplier
- 4h preference bonus
- per-symbol cap
- per-cluster cap
- total portfolio risk cap
- drawdown-based throttling
- hard position value cap

Purpose:
- reduce concentration blowups
- smooth fold dispersion
- lower over-allocation to unstable markets
- improve realism before deeper TradingEngine surgery

CURRENT RESEARCH STATUS
-----------------------
The platform currently supports:
- Strategy backtesting
- Symbol PnL attribution
- Symbol x Timeframe PnL attribution
- Strategy x Symbol x Timeframe attribution
- CIO market ranking and capped allocation
- Strategy fitness gating
- Alpha decay monitoring
- Regime classification reports
- Executive compact ChatGPT upload summary
- Pre-trade market selection
- Symbol/category constrained backtest runs
- True rule-based walk-forward rerun reporting
- Risk-budgeted opportunity scaling

KEY CURRENT INSIGHT
-------------------
Strongest edge profile remains:
- 4h
- leadership markets
- pullback inside trend
- expansion / high-vol regime

CURRENT LIMITATION
------------------
Risk budgeting currently scales trust at the portfolio/backtest layer.
Full trade-by-trade portfolio budgeting inside TradingEngine remains a later upgrade.

NEXT PRIORITIES
---------------
1. TradingEngine trade-level signal ranking + cooldown
2. TradingEngine-level quantity-aware risk budget integration
3. ATR position sizing per actual trade path
4. A84-driven regime integration
5. Position cap per symbol / market at execution layer
6. Hyperparameter walk-forward framework
7. Controlled shorting realism
8. Data QA + health scoring

INSTITUTIONAL CONCLUSION
------------------------
TQGA is now an institutional research-grade prototype with:
- pre-trade opportunity selection
- symbol/timeframe constrained testing
- friction-adjusted attribution
- risk-budgeted opportunity scaling
- true rule-based walk-forward reruns
and is moving toward more complete production-grade quant architecture.
